items.label: Apple Cinnamon
items.description: Crisp apple dominates with warm cinnamon in the base, creating a fresh yet cozy character reminiscent of freshly baked apple pie.

items.label: Cinnamon Orange Clove
items.description: Orange is the dominant note with clove and cinnamon as barely perceptible supporting notes. The overall character is sweet with balanced spice.

items.label: Campfire
items.description: Woody and fresh pine dominate with a smoking incense base, creating a warm and smoky character that evokes a natural campfire atmosphere.

items.label: Sweet Cinnamon Pumpkin
items.description: Warm pumpkin pie scent dominates with spice accords throughout, delivering a cozy autumn-inspired character reminiscent of a Pumpkin Spice Latte.

items.label: Cinnamon Roll
items.description: Warm cinnamon is the dominant note with sweet vanilla in the base, creating a warm and gourmand character evoking freshly baked cinnamon rolls.

items.label: Country Apple
items.description: Ripe red apples dominate, complemented by creamy blossoms and delicate spices, creating a fresh and bright character with good longevity.

items.label: Autumn Harvest
items.description: Warm spice notes, particularly cinnamon and cloves, dominate with supporting notes of crisp apple and citrus, rounded by vanilla cream in the base.

items.label: Fireplace Embers
items.description: Strong woody tobacco blend with fir needle and eucalyptus over a mossy base creates a smoky and woody character with herbal top notes and cologne-like qualities.

items.label: Homemade Pumpkin Pie
items.description: Fresh pumpkin dominates, complemented by orange, coconut, and warm spices with a sugary vanilla base, creating a warm, dessert-like character.

items.label: Chestnuts and Brown Sugar
items.description: Warm, toasted chestnut and brown sugar notes dominate with vanilla undertones, creating a cozy, baked-goods character with almond and amber accords.

items.label: Caramel Pumpkin
items.description: Smooth caramel is dominant with warm autumn pumpkin in a supporting role and light spice undertones, creating a sweet and cozy fall profile.

items.label: Cinnabon
items.description: Cinnamon dominates with a sweet glaze undertone, creating a warm and gourmand character evoking freshly baked cinnamon rolls without being overpowering.

items.label: Pumpkin Spice
items.description: Pumpkin pie scent is dominant with vanilla whipped cream as supporting base notes, creating a warm and cozy overall character.

items.label: Apple Cider II
items.description: Spiced apple note dominates with cinnamon undertones, creating a warm mulled cider character with cozy autumn spice qualities and traditional holiday character.

items.label: Pumpkin Cheesecake
items.description: Pumpkin dominates with almond and buttercream undertones, supported by warming spices including nutmeg, cinnamon, and clove, with hints of lemon and maple.

items.label: Ginger Pumpkin
items.description: Ginger is dominant with supporting spiced elements including cinnamon and clove, rounded by sweet vanilla base, creating a warm autumn character with pronounced sharp spice.

items.label: Caramel Apple
items.description: Creamy caramel dominates with a secondary apple component that varies by batch, creating a sweet and warm character with a butterscotch-like impression.

items.label: Apple Pie (Dutch)
items.description: Crisp green apple dominates with sweet and spiced undertones, creating a sugary and warm character with a baked pie sensibility.

items.label: Cinnamon Sticks
items.description: Dominant cinnamon note with warm, spicy characteristics reminiscent of holiday potpourri, creating a warm and festive classic seasonal aromatic experience.

items.label: Apple Walnut Crisp
items.description: Crisp apple dominates with warm walnut undertones, creating a balanced bakery-like profile with a sweet and homey character evoking freshly baked apple desserts.

items.label: Spiced Apple Pecan
items.description: Sweet, fresh apple dominates, supported by sugared spices and a pecan base, creating a baked, warm fragrance with a dessert-like character.

items.label: Mahogany & Black Tonka
items.description: Mahogany and black tonka are primary notes with supporting mirabelle plum, white sage, smoked tonka bean, and orris root, creating a warm, woody, sweet character with earthy, smoky undertones.

items.label: Cinnamon Blend 2
items.description: Warm cinnamon dominates with spicy undertones, creating a classic and warm spiced profile with bold, strong scent intensity.

items.label: Under the Leaves
items.description: Hay and citrus notes, particularly lemon peel and orange, dominate with fresh florals including lavender and jasmine, creating a bright and fresh composition with earthy depth.

items.label: Vintage Leather & Tabac
items.description: Tobacco dominates as the lead note, supported by aged whiskey and tobacco leaf in the middle, with vanilla bean, worn leather, and sandalwood in the base, creating a rich, warm, and smoky sophisticated profile.

items.label: Bonfire & Bourbon
items.description: Warm maple syrup and brandied apple notes transition to flame-roasted chestnuts and caramelized sugar, grounded in smoked bourbon and crackling firewood. The overall character is cozy and smoky, evoking a warm evening by a fire with woody and slightly sweet undertones.

items.label: Amish Quilt
items.description: Cinnamon dominates this fragrance, complemented by maple, almond, and soft vanilla undertones. The overall character is warm and cozy, particularly well-suited for fall applications.

items.label: Pumpkin Creme Brulee
items.description: Rich vanilla and pumpkin are the dominant notes, enhanced by warm spices in the base. The overall character is described as buttery creamy and cozy, creating an inviting, dessert-inspired scent profile.

items.label: Fresh Apple II
items.description: Crisp and juicy apple is the dominant note, delivering an authentic orchard-fresh scent. The overall character is bright and clean, with a naturally sweet quality that captures the essence of a fresh-picked red apple.

items.label: Pumpkin Patch (not skin safe)
items.description: Warm spice dominates, with pronounced notes of nutmeg, ginger, clove, and cinnamon. The overall profile is distinctly autumnal and warming, designed to evoke the sensory experience of a fall harvest season.

items.label: Pumpkin Harvest (not skin safe)
items.description: Warm spice notes dominated by ginger, nutmeg, and cinnamon are complemented by vanilla providing creamy sweetness and depth. The overall character is warm, buttery, and subtly spiced, evoking a cozy autumn atmosphere.

items.label: Classic Flannel
items.description: Crisp bergamot opens the fragrance, transitioning through lavandin in the middle, and settling into a warm base of patchouli, amber, and musk. Overall, it presents as a fresh and clean masculine scent with warm undertones.

items.label: My Way
items.description: Leather and cardamom lead this fragrance, followed by sandalwood and oud wood in the middle, grounded with vetiver, amber, and musk in the base. The overall character is sophisticated and woodsy with a masculine lean that combines fresh and earthy elements.

items.label: Charred Cedar & Spice
items.description: Smoked cedarwood dominates, with warm spice notes featuring cinnamon bark, clove, and fir needles in the middle layers, grounded by sandalwood suede and earthy base notes. The overall character is woody, warm, and aromatic with a rugged sophistication.

items.label: Patchouli & Dark Rum
items.description: Patchouli and musk dominate with spiced dark rum notes throughout, featuring clove and cinnamon on top, dark rum and leather in the middle, and warm amber in the base. Overall, it presents as a sultry, mysterious, and deeply spiced composition.

items.label: Cobalt Sage & Vetiver
items.description: Dominant vetiver and sage notes form a grounding herbaceous base, enriched by cedarwood and amber warmth with supporting notes of patchouli, violet, and oakmoss. The overall character is woody, earthy, and musky with herbaceous intensity.

items.label: Oud Noir & Lavandin
items.description: Smoky oud and sandalwood form the primary woody notes with lavandin, rosewood, and vetiver in the heart, finishing with agarwood, tonka bean, and black amber base notes. The overall character is sophisticated and aromatic, balancing dark woody elements with herbal lavender tones.

items.label: Clementine & Black Pepper
items.description: Zesty clementine and citrus freshness lead, supported by crushed black pepper and juniper berries in the middle notes, with blonde cedar and citrus musks providing a warm base. The overall character is invigorating and balanced, combining bright citrus with subtle spice.

items.label: I Love Fall Most Of All
items.description: Warm, spiced autumn scents dominate this collection, emphasizing cinnamon, apple, caramel, and cranberry notes, with supporting flavors of brown sugar and fig creating a sweet, cozy base. Overall, the fragrance profile is warm, sweet, and seasonally evocative with spiced and fruity elements.

items.label: Apple Bourbon
items.description: Apple and berry are the dominant character, supported by green citrus notes at the top and a woodsy, musky base with rose undertones. The overall profile is warm and slightly sweet with sophisticated woody depth.

items.label: Gold & Cashmere
items.description: Sweet citrus is the dominant note, complemented by creamy vanilla, musk, maple, and sandalwood in the base. The overall character is warm and soft with a dreamy quality.

items.label: Apples & Maple Bourbon
items.description: Caramelized apple with hints of orange dominates, supported by a middle of maple, caramel, and creamy sugar, with vanilla in the base. The overall character is warm and sweet with subtle spice undertones.

items.label: Candy Apple
items.description: Citrus notes open the fragrance, centering on a blend of mixed fruits including ripe red apple, orange, pear, strawberry, and banana, anchored by a caramelized maple syrup base. The overall character is sweet and fruity with warm, gourmand undertones.

items.label: Spiced Apple
items.description: Baked apple is the dominant note, complemented by warming spice accords of allspice, nutmeg, and cinnamon with a gentle vanilla base. The overall character is warm and comforting, reminiscent of apple pie.

items.label: REPLICA by the Fireplace
items.description: Smoky wood and roasted chestnuts are the dominant notes, complemented by vanilla and clove in the base. The scent evokes a cozy, warm character reminiscent of a crackling fireplace.

items.label: Bibliothèque
items.description: Plum and peach open this fragrance, moving through peony and violet in the middle, settling into a leather, patchouli, and vanilla base. The overall character is warm and nostalgic, evoking antique wood shelves and worn leather with a soft, velvety quality.

items.label: Feu de Bois
items.description: Smoky wood notes dominate, with birch providing a crisp top layer, while cedar and musk form a warm, comforting base. The overall character is enveloping and woody, reminiscent of a crackling fireplace with dry wood undertones.

items.label: Apple Cider Social
items.description: Mulled apple is the dominant top note, with middle notes of cinnamon and clove, grounded by vanilla sugar in the base. The overall character is a cozy, warm autumn blend with spiced apple cider undertones.

items.label: Love Spell
items.description: White florals dominate this fragrance, supported by amber and musk base notes. The overall character is fresh yet warm, creating a balanced floral composition with a sweet, mystical quality.

items.label: Cashmere Glow
items.description: Warm vanilla and golden peach are the primary notes, with musk providing a luxurious base layer. The overall character is sensual and gentle, creating a warm, soft fragrance.

items.label: Amazing Grace
items.description: This fragrance features bergamot as the dominant top note, followed by clean floral blossoms in the base, with a fresh, feminine and clean overall character.

items.label: Coco Chanel
items.description: A sophisticated and romantic composition with vanilla content, displaying yellow amber to dark amber tones. The scent evokes a sensual, warm character reminiscent of the classic Chanel original.

items.label: Bombshell
items.description: Features peony and white tea as dominant notes with passion fruit and citrus brightness, orange flower and pink peppercorn in the heart, and white musk, sugar, vanilla, and amber in the base. A sweet, floral-fruity fragrance with fresh and glamorous character.

items.label: Caribbean Escape
items.description: Combines juicy grapefruit and tropical pineapple as the dominant notes with creamy coconut and vanilla in the base. Fresh, tropical, and subtly sweet overall character.

items.label: Amber Romance
items.description: A warm amber fragrance with supporting notes of black cherry, vanilla, and sandalwood, creating a warm and romantic scent profile.

items.label: Chanel No. 5
items.description: A floral composition with rose, jasmine, and lily of the valley as the primary notes. Classic, feminine, and timeless with a refined, sophisticated character.

items.label: Light Blue
items.description: Features peach blossom and lemon as dominant top notes, complemented by lavender in the middle and an amber base. Earthy and balanced with a fresh, slightly floral profile.

items.label: Bali Spa Time
items.description: Features jasmine as the dominant note, complemented by lemon and musk in the base. Soft and watery, creating a relaxing spa-like atmosphere.

items.label: Black Amethyst
items.description: Features bergamot as the dominant note, complemented by camellias with exotic sandalwood as the base. Sensual and elegant with subtle, lasting tones.

items.label: Candy Concoction
items.description: A dominant sweet vanilla note layered with berry undertones and bubblegum accents, delivering a bright, youthful sugary and fruity profile with playful character.

items.label: Pure Seduction
items.description: A little fruity and a little floral with a fresh quality, accurately mimicking the original Victoria's Secret scent. Fresh and long-lasting character.

items.label: Tahiti Sweetie
items.description: Opens with fresh grapefruit and pear, transitions through peach and blackcurrant, and settles into a soft musky base. Tropical and fruity with a sweet profile.

items.label: Moonlight Path
items.description: Features floral notes including rose, jasmine, violet, tuberose, ylang-ylang, lily of the valley, and lilac, supported by lavender, bergamot, and citrus. The base combines sandalwood, vetiver, oakmoss, vanilla, patchouli, amber, and musk, creating an earthy yet floral profile.

items.label: Daisy
items.description: Features peach blossom and grapefruit as dominant notes, complemented by floral elements. A fresh, light fragrance with a bright, citrus-forward scent profile and delicate floral undertones.

items.label: Baccarat Rouge
items.description: Features vanilla orchid as the dominant top note, with jasmine absolute and amberwood in the heart, supported by oakmoss and opulent wood in the base. Elegant and woody with creamy floral accents.

items.label: Twilight Woods
items.description: A warm fragrance with sweet cashmere notes and woody undertones. Pleasant and yummy character, ideal for fall and winter wear.

items.label: Be Enchanted
items.description: The dominant note is pomegranate, providing a sparkling, sugary quality. Supporting floral notes add a frosted, charming character, creating a sweet, fruity profile with a delicate floral backbone.

items.label: Carnation
items.description: Opens with fresh floral notes complemented by hints of rose and lemon. Fresh, clean character without being heavily perfumy. Light, airy fragrance with moderate longevity.

items.label: Beautiful Day
items.description: Features sun-kissed apple as its dominant note, complemented by soft florals. Refreshing and light, creating an invigorating sensory experience.

items.label: Cashmere Moon II
items.description: A soft, powdery floral fragrance built on rose and lily of the valley as the dominant notes, with jasmine and musk in the base. Delicate and feminine with a subtle, elegant quality.

items.label: Cheirosa 62
items.description: Features toasted pistachio and salted caramel as dominant top notes, layered with almond milk and candied caramel, grounded by creamy vanilla, sandalwood, and brown sugar base notes. Warm, sweet, and gourmand with beachy, dessert-like qualities.

items.label: Pure Grace
items.description: Leads with white floral notes, primarily water lilies, supported by leafy green elements and a frosted musk base. Delicate and fresh, presenting as a light, clean scent.

items.label: Gorgeous Gardenia
items.description: A white floral fragrance with gardenia as the dominant note, creating an airy and fresh composition. Feminine with a light, delicate quality typical of white florals.

items.label: Chance
items.description: Features patchouli as a dominant base note, complemented by fruity elements of pineapple and hyacinth, creating a warm and earthy composition with a slight spicy side yet bright and alluring character.

items.label: Pink Vanilla Kiss
items.description: Features top notes of peach blossoms and berries with precious white floral heart notes and a soft, sugary amber base. A sweet, feminine composition balancing fruity and floral elements with a warm, sugary finish.

items.label: Allure
items.description: This fragrance features citrus as the dominant note, with notes of orange and mandarin complemented by floral elements including jasmine and lily of the valley. The overall character is a fresh, crisp scent with an alluring quality from the citrus-floral blend.

items.label: Secret Crush
items.description: This fragrance features frosted pear as the dominant note, complemented by sweet peach and fresh peonies. The overall character is light and fruity with floral undertones, creating an airy, candy-like quality.

items.label: Juicy Couture
items.description: This fragrance opens with crisp apple notes, followed by floral heart notes of rose and lily of the valley, creating a fresh and delicate overall character with subtle sweetness.

items.label: Poppy
items.description: This fruity-floral scent features sandalwood and vanilla as its foundation, complemented by bright notes of cucumber flower, mandarin, and freesia. The overall character is fresh and clean with a sweet, creamy undertone.

items.label: Sugar Chick
items.description: Sugar Chick features a dominant marshmallow and cream note with supporting cake and candy sweetness, creating a warm and candy-like character that develops into a sugary, macaroon-like scent as it dries down.

items.label: Forever Red
items.description: The fragrance features sweet, fruity notes of black currant as its dominant character, complemented by floral elements of jasmine, rose, and lily of the valley. These are grounded in a vanilla raspberry base, creating a warm and softly feminine composition.

items.label: Be Delicious
items.description: This fruity fragrance leads with apple and grapefruit notes, layered with floral hints of carnation and violet. The overall character is clean, bright, and fresh—a light, refreshing fruity floral composition.

items.label: Sweet on Paris
items.description: This fragrance features vanilla as the dominant note, complemented by fresh berries and lemon zest. The supporting elements create a warm, sugary profile with bakery-like characteristics.

items.label: Big Island Bamboo
items.description: Big Island Bamboo features a watery, woodsy character with prominent green melon and woods in the top notes, supported by jasmine and pine in the middle, finishing with a white, mossy base.

items.label: Caribbean Queen
items.description: Caribbean Queen is a citrusy fragrance with prominent notes of raspberry and fresh mint, rounded out by sugary vanilla. The scent combines fruity and floral elements to create a fresh and sweet character.

items.label: Baby Lotion Pink
items.description: This fragrance features a classic, powdery, baby fresh scent with a dominant powdery note creating a soft, clean character reminiscent of traditional infant care products.

items.label: Secret Wonderland
items.description: This fragrance combines white amber, frosted jasmine, and luscious strawberries as its primary notes. The scent profile creates a sweet and floral composition with fruity undertones, delivering a romantic and indulgent character.

items.label: Opium (our version of YSL)
items.description: This fragrance features cinnamon as its dominant note, complemented by lily of the valley and honey in the middle, with a woody vanilla base. The overall character is spicy and feminine with a strong, lasting impression.

items.label: Moon Sparkle (our version of Escada)
items.description: This fragrance opens with fruity top notes of strawberry, black currant, citruses, and red fruits before settling into a floral heart. The composition features sweet pea, freesia, jasmine, and rose, creating a balanced, fresh-yet-sweet character.

items.label: Santal 33 (Our version of Le Labo)
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by sandalwood and cedarwood, with prominent spicy cardamom and violet leaf notes supported by musky, ambery base notes. The overall character is woody, spicy, and leathery with a creamy sweetness and smoky quality.

items.label: Delicious Juicy Berry (our version of DKNY)
items.description: This fragrance features wildberry and raspberry as dominant notes, complemented by citrus undertones. The overall character is juicy and sweet, creating a fruity composition that balances sweetness without being cloying.

items.label: Lost Cherry (our version of Tom Ford)
items.description: The fragrance opens with juicy black cherry and bitter almond, transitioning through rose and jasmine in the middle, before settling into a warm base of tonka bean, cedarwood, and sandalwood. The overall character is warm and sensual with a fruity opening that gradually becomes woody and creamy.

items.label: Tommy Girl (our version of Tommy Hilfiger)
items.description: Tommy Girl is a floral fragrance anchored by warm sandalwood and cedar notes with rose, honeysuckle, and jasmine supporting elements, creating a refreshing and youthful overall character.

items.label: White Diamonds (our version of Elizabeth Taylor)
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant white floral note with musk as its base, creating a sweet overall character. The scent combines floral and musky elements to create a feminine, powdery quality typical of classic white floral fragrances.

items.label: Forever Sunshine
items.description: This fragrance features fruity apricot and citrus as its dominant notes, complemented by peony and gardenia florals in the heart and base. The overall character is bright, warm, and feminine.

items.label: Beautiful Fragrance Oil Collection Set for Women
items.description: This collection contains six distinct feminine scents rather than a single fragrance, spanning fresh and fruity to warm and sweet character profiles. The set includes floral-forward fragrances like Bombshell with peony and white tea notes, alongside sweeter options like Pink Sugar featuring grapefruit and vanilla.

items.label: Sheer Freesia (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: The dominant note is freesia, a classic, floral, and feminine scent that creates an overall character that is light and floral in nature, with a fresh quality typical of freesia fragrances.

items.label: Champagne Toast (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: This fragrance opens with fruity citrus notes including cherry and strawberry, transitions through a floral heart, and settles into a musky vanilla base with powdery undertones. The overall character is sweet and celebratory with a sophisticated fruity-floral profile.

items.label: Pink Hibiscus (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: This fragrance features a bright citrus top note paired with delicate tropical hibiscus florals as the dominant character. The composition creates a sweet, floral profile that is refreshing and botanical in nature.

items.label: Eilish (our version of Billie Eilish)
items.description: This fragrance features red berries and sugar as the dominant top notes, followed by candied rose and creamy cocoa in the middle, with whipped vanilla and cashmere musk as the base. The overall character is sweet and creamy with floral undertones and a soft, musky drydown.

items.label: Falling in Love (our version of Philosophy)
items.description: Powdery berry notes dominate with a white floral base creating a sensual character. The profile balances sweetness with delicate florals, delivering a sophisticated and romantic impression without being overly fruity.

items.label: Bleu de Chanel (our version of Chanel)
items.description: Bright grapefruit and lemon citrus notes open, followed by spicy ginger and pepper in the middle, settling into a woody cedar and patchouli base. The overall profile is fresh and aromatic with a crisp, slightly spicy character.

items.label: Cloud Pink (Our Version of Ariana Grande)
items.description: Rich berries and sparkling fruit open, transitioning through vanilla orchid and coconut water in the middle, finishing with praline, musk, and amber woods. The character is warm, sweet, and skin-sensual with a dreamy, feminine quality.

items.label: Black Opium (Our Version of YSL)
items.description: Pear and pink pepper open, evolving through coffee and jasmine in the middle, settling into a warm base of vanilla, patchouli, and cedar. The overall character is gourmand and intoxicating, blending bright top notes with deep, warm base accords.

items.label: Cheirosa '68 (Our Version of Sol De Janeiro Beija Flor)
items.description: Pink dragonfruit and lychee open, transitioning through jasmine and ocean air in the heart, settling into a sheer vanilla and sun musk base. The overall character is exotic and tropical with fresh, slightly sweet qualities.

items.label: Cheirosa 71 (Our Version of Sol De Janeiro)
items.description: Caramelized vanilla and sea salt open, transitioning through toasted macadamia nut and creamy milk notes, settling into a warm base of tonka bean and coconut blossom. The character is sweet, creamy, and gourmand with subtle nutty warmth.

items.label: Don't be Shy (our version of Kilian)
items.description: Neroli and bergamot top notes with orange blossom and Bulgarian rose at the heart, finished by a vanilla sugar base. The overall character is fresh and sweet with a sunny, botanical quality.

items.label: Paradoxe (Our Version of Prada)
items.description: Citrus top notes of pear, tangerine, and bergamot open into a floral heart of orange blossom, neroli, and jasmine. The base combines vanilla, amber, white musk, and benzoin for a warm, sensual depth.

items.label: Paris Hilton (our version of Paris Hilton)
items.description: Fruity top notes of apple and melon with gardenia in the middle, finished with a white musky powdery raspberry base. The overall character is sweet and fruity with a flirty, addictive quality.

items.label: Dark Kiss (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Patchouli dominates with supporting notes of sugary vanilla and powdery raspberry. The combination produces a sweet yet earthy profile that balances gourmand sweetness with the grounding quality of patchouli.

items.label: Honey (our version of Henri Bendel)
items.description: Warm honey dominates with subtle incense undertones. The scent profile balances sweetness with a hint of spice-like complexity from the incense component, creating an overall sweet and slightly earthy character.

items.label: Ps I love You (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Velvety rose and pink peony are the dominant floral notes, with golden amber and exotic incense providing warmth in the base. The overall character is a sweet, complex floral with spiced and amber undertones.

items.label: Miss (Our Version of Dior)
items.description: Iris, peony, and lily-of-the-valley open into apricot, rose, and peach in the middle, settling into a soft base of vanilla, musk, tonka bean, benzoin, and sandalwood. The overall character is elegant and powdery with a delicate floral bouquet.

items.label: Bright Crystal (Our Version of Versace)
items.description: Yuzu, pomegranate, and iced notes open into a floral heart of peony and magnolia before settling into a base of musk and amber. The overall character is sensual and feminine with a fresh, juicy quality balanced by delicate florals.

items.label: Candy (Our Version of Prada)
items.description: Caramel is the dominant note, balanced with powdery musk and benzoin in the base. The overall character is playful and indulgent, combining sweet and warm qualities.

items.label: After Hours Cheirosa 76 (Our Version of Sol De Janeiro)
items.description: Black currant and pear open, transitioning through jasmine and vanilla in the middle notes, settling into a warm base of caramel, patchouli, and amberwood. The overall character is warm and inviting with a sophisticated balance of sweetness and woody depth.

items.label: Rio Radiance (Our Version of Sol De Janeiro)
items.description: Citrus brightness from bergamot and orange opens, transitions through sweet floral and jasmine notes, settling into a warm base of vanilla, amber, and musk. The overall character is sultry and sweet with sophisticated depth.

items.label: Cheirosa 59 (Our Version of Sol De Janeiro)
items.description: Vanilla is the dominant note with supporting elements of orchid, sugar, and violet, complemented by a base of sandalwood and vetiver. The overall character is warm, comforting, and amber-vanilla in nature, evoking the warmth of a sunset.

items.label: Missing Person (Our Version of Phlur)
items.description: White musk dominates with sheer floral nuances of jasmine and orange blossom, and soft transparent woods. The composition features skin musk and bergamot at the top, cyclamen and neroli in the middle, and sandalwood with blonde wood in the base, creating a clean, transparent character with subtle warmth.

items.label: Bombshell Magic (Our Version of Victoria's Secret)
items.description: Blackberry and lemon brightness open, blooming through peony and magnolia in the middle, finishing with soft sandalwood and musk. The overall character is confident and bold with a fruity-floral composition and subtle creamy warmth from the base notes.

items.label: Gentle Fluidity Gold (Our Version of MFK)
items.description: Vanilla and amber form the creamy foundation, enhanced by soft juniper and coriander with subtle spice notes creating a champagne-like fizz. Woodsy and musky base notes layered with warm amber deliver a sweet and sultry composition with complexity.

items.label: Peach Citrus (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Zesty citrus top note is sweetened by peach and melon in the middle, with rose providing a floral base. The overall character is bright and fruity with a sweet, fresh quality.

items.label: MOD Blush (Our Version of Ariana Grande)
items.description: Fruity top notes of raspberry and passionfruit balanced by bergamot develop through rose and magnolia in the middle, settling into a base of musk and sandalwood. The overall character is complex fruity floral with modern sophistication and sensual warmth.

items.label: Bergamot & Hinoki (our version of Salt & Stone)
items.description: Bergamot provides the dominant citrus opening, followed by Japanese hinoki cypress in the heart and woody base notes. The fragrance combines bright citrus character with earthy, woody undertones for a fresh yet grounded overall profile.

items.label: Santal & Vetiver (our version of Salt & Stone)
items.description: Sandalwood is the heart note with earthy vetiver in the base and subtle floral accents on top. The overall character is deep woodsy with a creamy quality that remains fragrant through extended use.

items.label: Black Rose & Oud Fragrance Oil
items.description: The fragrance features dark rose as its dominant opening note, complemented by smoky oud in the heart and warm resin with patchouli in the base. Overall, this is a deep, mysterious, and resinous fragrance with dark floral and woody character.

items.label: Queens & Monsters Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features sandalwood as its dominant note, complemented by violet leaf, freesia, and jasmine in the middle, with vanilla bean, ambroxan, and patchouli providing depth. The overall character is warm, spicy, and woody with fresh citrus accents from petitgrain.

items.label: Original Pheromone Perfume Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with Australian Mango and mandarin brightness, evolving through a warm honey and cinnamon heart before settling into a clean white musk base. The overall character is subtle, enticing, and sensual with unisex appeal.

items.label: Pure Wonder Fragrance Oil
items.description: Pure Wonder leads with fruity top notes of fruit nectars and pink sugar, followed by floral middle notes of star jasmine and rose. The base combines sheer musk, white amber, and sandalwood for an overall warm, elegant character.

items.label: Snowkissed Sugar Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features a fruity floral blend anchored by vanilla sugar as its foundation. The scent combines apple and peach as top notes with jasmine in the middle, creating an overall character that is sweet and creamy with subtle floral elements.

items.label: Too Pretty Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features fruity and floral top notes of grapefruit, peach blossom, and cyclamen, followed by middle notes of lily of the valley and jasmine, with a sweet vanilla base that creates an overall fresh and floral character.

items.label: English Tea Rose Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance is centered on rose in the middle notes, with citrus top notes from lemon peel and a clove base. The overall character is described as a classic, vintage fragrance with a feminine floral touch.

items.label: Find Comfort Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with sparkling citrus notes of lemon zest, pomelo, and rhubarb, transitioning to a floral heart of jasmine and violet with black tea. The base combines vetiver, tonka beans, and cashmere wood for a grounded, woody-musk finish that feels both uplifting and calming.

items.label: Cheirosa 40 Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance leads with plum and black amber notes, followed by jasmine and orchid in the middle, finishing with vanilla, woody notes, and musk in the base. It's described as a soft yet sultry floral-gourmand with a warm, creamy character.

items.label: English Pear & Freesia Fragrance Oil
items.description: The dominant pear and melon notes lead this fragrance, which develops into a floral heart of freesia and rose. The base combines musk, patchouli, rhubarb, and amber to create an overall character that is fresh and elegant, evoking an autumn orchard with gentle warmth.

items.label: Goddess Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features vanilla as the dominant note, with lavender and cocoa in the middle, supported by a base of vanilla absolute and tonka bean. The overall character is described as a confident, layered blend of warm vanilla, earthy lavender, and radiant woods—both grounded and ethereal.

items.label: Donna Born In Roma Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance combines jasmine as its floral heart with bourbon vanilla and woodsy undertones in the base, accented by blackcurrant and pink pepper at the top. The overall character is warm and spicy-floral with a modern edge, offering an elegant and feminine profile.

items.label: Libre Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with bright lavender and mandarin orange, transitions through floral orange blossom and jasmine in the middle, and settles into a warm base of vanilla, cedarwood, and musk. The overall character balances strength and elegance with a bold, feminine quality.

items.label: Dream Bright Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance is built on sparkling berries as its dominant top note, with sugared petals and vanilla orchid in the middle, grounded by bright musk and sheer woods. The overall character is fresh and floral with a sweet, luminous quality.

items.label: La Vie Est Belle Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with black currant and pear, followed by iris, jasmine, and orange blossom in the heart. The base combines praline, vanilla, patchouli, and tonka bean for a warm, sweet, gourmand character with fruity-floral elements.

items.label: Vanilla 28 Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with vanilla orchid and jasmine, followed by creamy tonka bean and brown sugar in the middle, with amber, musk, and patchouli providing a warm base. The overall character is decadent and gourmand with soft floral and woody undertones.

items.label: Delina Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance oil features a prominent rose scent enhanced by tart lychee and peony in the middle notes, grounded by vanilla and incense in the base. It delivers a sensual, floral composition with fruity brightness and creamy warmth that creates a feminine fragrance with notable depth.

items.label: Good Girl Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with almond and coffee notes, followed by floral middle notes of jasmine and tuberose, and settles into a warm base of tonka bean, cocoa, and vanilla. The overall character is sweet and sensual with a bold, modern femme fatale quality.

items.label: Vanilla Skin Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance oil features vanilla as the dominant note, softened by white florals and tonka bean in the middle, with skin accord, amber, and cashmere in the base. The overall character is intimate and sensual with a minimalist, second-skin quality that is warm and creamy.

items.label: Black Lacquer Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features a smoky black lacquer and rum accord with black pepper as dominant top notes, complemented by ebony wood and peony in the middle, finishing with an incense-like base. The overall character is deep and mysterious with a dark, woody sophistication.

items.label: Flowerbomb Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features an opulent floral composition with bergamot and tea as top notes, followed by orchid, jasmine, rose, and freesia in the middle, finishing with patchouli, musk, and vanilla in the base. The overall character is sweet and creamy with a lush, complex floral profile.

items.label: Bergamote 22 Fragrance Oil
items.description: This citrus-forward fragrance features prominent bergamot and grapefruit notes at the top, creating a fresh, zesty opening. Supporting orange blossom and petitgrain add subtle floral complexity in the heart, while vetiver, cedarwood, and amber provide a warm, woody base with powdery sweetness. Overall, the scent is bright and fresh with a refined, balanced character that transitions from citrus to woody warmth.

items.label: J'Adore Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance oil features floral top notes of bergamot and ylang-ylang, with a heart of rose and jasmine, grounded in a warm base of sandalwood, vanilla, and musk. The overall character is creamy and radiant with woody undertones. It's designed as an interpretation of a classic designer fragrance profile.

items.label: Flora Gorgeous Orchid Fragrance Oil
items.description: The fragrance centers on vanilla as its dominant note, followed by vanilla orchid in the middle and ozonic fresh marine notes in the base. Overall, it presents as a gourmand floral with creamy sweetness balanced by airy freshness, creating a modern and joyful character.

items.label: Another 13 Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features a clean, musky-amber composition centered on ambroxan and soft woods. The top notes of pear and Iso E Super blend into middle notes of ambrette and jasmine, while the base anchors with ambroxan and musk for a quietly sensual character overall.

items.label: Vanilla Candy Rock Sugar 42 (our version of Kayali)
items.description: Candied vanilla dominates with rock sugar and berries in the middle, supported by amber, woods, and musk. The overall character is sugary-sweet and warm with a soft woody undertone.

items.label: Yum Pistachio Gelato 33 (our version of Kayali)
items.description: Pistachio and hazelnut lead with nutty top notes, followed by peony and heliotrope florals, finishing with whipped cream, marshmallow, and creamy sandalwood. The overall character is sweet and gourmand.

items.label: Idole Now (our version of Lancome)
items.description: Rose dominates with orchid in the middle and vanilla bourbon in the base. The overall character is soft and feminine with a modern, floral profile that balances brightness with smoothness.

items.label: Bloom (our version of Gucci)
items.description: Jasmine leads as the dominant note with tuberose in the heart and a base of Rangoon creeper and musk. The overall profile is a creamy, lush white floral composition with a garden-like character.

items.label: Beach Skin (our version of Phlur)
items.description: Salty citrus top notes transition to skin musk and coconut in the middle, settling into a warm base of amber, sandalwood, and vanilla. The overall character is fresh and aquatic with warm, creamy undertones evoking a coastal aesthetic.

items.label: Heavy Cream (our version of Phlur)
items.description: Whipped cream dominates followed by warm milk and tonka bean in the middle, with vanilla, soft woods, and musk forming the base. The overall character is a decadent, lactonic gourmand with cozy warmth and subtle woody undertones.

items.label: French Waltz (our version of Golf le Fleur)
items.description: Bright citrus and fruity top notes of mandarin, pear, and lychee move into a floral heart of jasmine, rose, and mimosa, finishing with musk and sandalwood. The overall character is fresh and dreamy, evoking a summery garden with creamy, slightly sweet undertones.

items.label: Strawberry Letter (our version of Phlur)
items.description: Dominant strawberry note with pear in the top accord, followed by jasmine petals and white tea in the middle, and creamy musk with blonde woods base. The overall character balances playful sweetness with sophistication and nostalgic warmth.

items.label: Peach Skin (our version of Phlur)
items.description: Peach nectar leads complemented by orris and rose in the middle, settling into creamy woods and skin musk at the base. The overall character is juicy and soft with a velvety texture blending fruity sweetness with warm, musky undertones.

items.label: Rose 31 (our version of Le Labo)
items.description: Spicy rose leads complemented by cumin and cedarwood in the middle, with warm oud and musk creating the base. The overall character is a floral-woody blend with spicy and warm undertones.

items.label: Black Orchid (our version of Tom Ford)
items.description: Black orchid forms the heart supported by truffle and woody lotus in the middle, while patchouli, incense, vanilla, and vetiver create a warm, smoky base. The overall character is dark and mysterious with an intoxicating, sensual quality.

items.label: Soleil Blanc (our version of Tom Ford)
items.description: Creamy coconut and white florals dominate, grounded by tonka bean and amber in the base, with pistachio and bergamot providing initial brightness. The overall character is a warm, luxurious solar scent with creamy, slightly sweet and opulent qualities.

items.label: Basil (our version of Le Labo)
items.description: Basil leaf with green citrus opens the fragrance, supported by geranium and violet leaf in the middle, finishing with white musk and hay in the base. The overall character is fresh and herbaceous with a gentle, soft floral quality.

items.label: Oud Minerale (our version of Tom Ford)
items.description: Oud dominates complemented by marine and cypress accords in the middle, with a base of ambergris, sandalwood, and vetiver. The overall character is salty, mineral-infused oud with oceanic freshness, smoky woods, and a cool, clean resinous finish.

items.label: Wood Sage & Sea Salt (our version of Jo Malone)
items.description: Sea salt and sage center the fragrance with amber and driftwood providing warmth in the base. The composition creates an airy, mineral quality evoking a coastal atmosphere with fresh, herbaceous character and subtle woody undertones.

items.label: Myrrh & Tonka (our version of Jo Malone)
items.description: Lavender opens before transitioning to a smoky myrrh heart, settling into a warm base of tonka bean, amber, and cedarwood. The overall character is deeper and more intense with resinous and creamy qualities creating a warm and woody profile.

items.label: Lavender Vanilla
items.description: Lavender leads as the dominant note with vanilla as the supporting base. The overall character is cozy and calming with warm qualities.

items.label: Lavender
items.description: Fresh lavender presents as the dominant note, creating a peaceful character reminiscent of a lavender field. The profile emphasizes the herb's natural, clean qualities.

items.label: Gardenia
items.description: Muguet and jasmine provide prominent top notes, complemented by lilac and amber in the middle, with a soft violet base. The composition features subtle fruit undertones of strawberry and grape, resulting in a balanced, delicate, and nostalgic character.

items.label: Fresh Rose
items.description: Delicate rose with gardenia dominates, supported by fruity undertones of pear, orange, and apple. The overall character is fresh and naturally floral, delivering real roses without an artificial or overly perfumed quality.

items.label: Jasmine
items.description: Authentic white floral scent centered on jasmine as the dominant note. The composition delivers a classic floral character with notable intensity.

items.label: Rose
items.description: Pure, premium rose scent with an authentic, floral character. The overall profile is fresh and botanical with soft, heady rose notes, transporting users to a rose garden setting with natural qualities.

items.label: Patchouli Cedarwood (all natural)
items.description: Patchouli dominates with a strong, earthy character, complemented by cedarwood's woodsy notes. The overall scent is natural, woodsy, and fresh with an earthy quality, appealing to those preferring grounded, natural-smelling products.

items.label: Eucalyptus Spearmint (version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Sharp, fresh eucalyptus dominates complemented by spearmint in a supporting role. The overall character is refreshing and strong with medicinal qualities that many find relaxing and invigorating.

items.label: Japanese Cherry Blossom (version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Floral profile with warm qualities offering a warm, floral scent with subtle notes of both sweet and bitter. The scent captures the essence of cherry blossoms with a balanced, slightly complex character.

items.label: Lavender Chamomile
items.description: Lavender is the dominant note in this blend, providing a sharp, fresh character. Chamomile serves as a supporting note, contributing a calming, soft quality. Overall, the fragrance has a cozy, herbal tea-like profile with a gentle, soothing nature.

items.label: Lilac & Lilies
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by lilac and lily florals with a sweet character. The blend delivers floral and sweet notes that create a spring-like scent profile. Overall, it presents as a fresh, delicate floral composition.

items.label: Sandalwood Rose
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by a warm, woody sandalwood base combined with lush jasmine and velvety rose, creating a low, spicy scent. The composition blends floral and woody elements into a versatile fragrance that is soft yet long-lasting.

items.label: Chamomile
items.description: This fragrance features a predominantly floral profile with notes of lilac and rose creating a powdery, sweet character. The scent carries herbal tea qualities reminiscent of chamomile, though it leans more toward white florals. Overall, it presents as a gentle, mild fragrance with a calming, delicate nature.

items.label: Mango Madness
items.description: This fragrance features mango as its dominant note, complemented by tropical fruit accords of mandarin, orange, and grapefruit in the top layer. The middle notes introduce peach, coconut, and jasmine, while vanilla and raspberry-peach form the base. Overall, the scent profiles as a fruity tropical composition with sweet, fresh character.

items.label: Wisteria and Lilac
items.description: This fragrance features sparkling fruity top notes that transition to base notes of a floral bouquet. The overall character is a delicate, sweet floral blend that reviewers describe as light and subtle rather than overwhelming.

items.label: Coconut Milk Lavender
items.description: This fragrance features lavender as the dominant note, complemented by coconut milk and vanilla as supporting base notes. The overall character is creamy and sweet, with a smooth, fresh quality that blends floral and gourmand elements.

items.label: Lavender and Rosemary (all natural)
items.description: This fragrance oil features lavender and rosemary as dominant notes, with supporting hints of eucalyptus and coriander, grounded in fractionated coconut. The scent profile is fresh and herbaceous with a calming quality.

items.label: Eucalyptus Mint
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant medicinal eucalyptus note complemented by mint, creating a fresh and invigorating profile. The scent is lively and designed to awaken the senses with a clean, crisp character that opens the sinuses.

items.label: Egyptian Dragon
items.description: The fragrance features myrrh and patchouli as dominant warm notes, complemented by rose and jasmine with woodsy musk base notes. Overall, it presents a warm, spicy, and mysterious aromatic character with enduring longevity.

items.label: Plumeria
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant floral plumeria note with top notes of floral, pineapple, and peach, with a green leaves base. The overall character is tropical and fresh, with fruity undertones that create a gentle, relaxing profile.

items.label: Tuberose
items.description: This fragrance features tuberose as its dominant floral heart, complemented by fruity citrus top notes and lily of the valley, with lilac and orange blossom supporting the bouquet. The overall character is velvet, smooth with slightly sweet and musky undertones, creating a romantic and sophisticated floral profile.

items.label: Sweet Pea
items.description: This fragrance features delicate jasmine as the dominant note, complemented by anise and peach blossom in the middle, with an earthy musk base. The overall character is floral and mild with a gentle, garden-like quality.

items.label: Rose & Peony
items.description: This fragrance features a white floral composition with citrus top notes that transition to jasmine, rose, and violet in the middle. The fragrance settles into a musky base, creating a sheer and delicate white floral profile overall.

items.label: Amberwood Moss
items.description: This fragrance opens with citrus and bergamot notes, layered over woody base notes with a mossy amber undertone. The overall character is clean and vibrant, with a soft, subtle quality that works well for both masculine and unisex applications.

items.label: Patchouli
items.description: The dominant note is a pungent, earthy patchouli scent that forms the core of this fragrance. The oil delivers an authentic, grounded character with strong staying power and minimal fading over time. Overall, it presents as a classic, straightforward patchouli profile without additional sweetness or complexity.

items.label: Pink Salt & Water Lily
items.description: This fragrance opens with fruity notes of peach, apple, and melon as the dominant character. It's supported by lily of the valley and jasmine in the base. Overall, it delivers a fresh, clean scent with balanced fruity and delicate floral elements.

items.label: Island Hibiscus
items.description: This fragrance features a floral foundation with soft, sweet peach blossom and bright floral notes of jasmine, rose, and gardenia with a base of sandalwood. The scent profile is tropical and exotic, delivering a fresh yet sweet character with underlying woody undertones.

items.label: Jasmine Frangipani
items.description: This fragrance oil features exotic floral notes centered on jasmine and frangipani. It delivers a fresh and strong scent with tropical floral character. The overall profile is heavenly soft and lingering, with feminine tropical qualities that evoke Hawaiian white ginger-like warmth.

items.label: Lemon Verbena (all natural)
items.description: This fragrance features a crisp lemon dominant note balanced with floral and wood undertones. The scent profile is crisp and clean with citrus, floral, and wood components creating an uplifting character. Reviewers consistently note it as light and fresh rather than overpowering.

items.label: Lily of the Valley 1
items.description: This fragrance is described as a delicate and classic green floral that is clean and bright. The scent features green floral as its dominant characteristic with a fresh, clean overall character that evokes the smell of fresh-cut lily of the valley flowers.

items.label: Cardamom Cedar Blossom
items.description: This fragrance features warm amber and cinnamon as dominant notes, with green leafy stems providing supporting character. The overall profile is cozy and inviting, though reviewers note it reads more as a soft, warm scent than distinctly woody or herbal despite its name.

items.label: Aloe
items.description: This fragrance features a spa-inspired composition with floral notes as the dominant character, complemented by sandalwood and cedarwood base notes alongside citrus accords. The overall profile is clean and fresh with woody undertones.

items.label: Night Blooming Jasmine
items.description: This fragrance features green top notes, precious heart notes of jasmine, ylang-ylang, and exquisite rose with woody base notes that create a warm, well-rounded finish. The fragrance balances floral sweetness with green freshness and grounding wood elements. Overall, it presents as an elegant, warm floral composition.

items.label: Green Tea
items.description: This fragrance features herbaceous and green notes as the dominant character, with a subtle sweetness that distinguishes it from natural green tea scent. The overall profile is light, bright and clean with a refreshing, calming quality that avoids being heavy or overbearing.

items.label: Sandalwood Patchouli
items.description: Patchouli dominates with supporting sandalwood and orange blossom notes creating an earthy blend. The scent develops a subtle powdery quality as it dries down, combining rich warmth with floral depth. Overall character is woody, sensual, and full-bodied.

items.label: Lemon Verbena
items.description: Lemon is the dominant note, complemented by lime and sweet orange in the top notes. The overall character is clean and refreshing, with a delicate quality that doesn't project strongly over extended periods.

items.label: Peony PF
items.description: Dominant powdery floral note characteristic of peony blooms with sweet and soft supporting notes. The overall character is delicate and traditionally floral, with a powdery finish that carries a slightly vintage quality.

items.label: Juniper Breeze
items.description: Juicy juniper berries dominate, complemented by fir trees and balsam undertones. The overall character is balmy and wintery, creating a fresh, natural woody scent profile with herbal-aromatic qualities.

items.label: Green Tea and Lemongrass
items.description: Lemongrass dominates as the citrus note, balanced with green tea undertones that add an herbal quality. The overall character is refreshing and energizing, with a clean, naturally fresh profile.

items.label: Sea Salt
items.description: Woodsy, crisp aquatic profile as the dominant characteristic, complemented by supporting notes of lavender, lemon, and rose. The overall impression is fresh and oceanic with a subtle soapy quality.

items.label: Baby Grace
items.description: Fresh florals and soft white musks create the primary character, delivering a beautifully clean and fresh overall profile. The composition leans toward delicate and gentle notes rather than bold or heavy accords.

items.label: Blue Lotus Amber
items.description: Dominant floral lotus note with soft, powdery characteristics, complemented by a warm amber base. The overall character is cozy, sweet, and inviting with a subtle Asian-inspired floral quality.

items.label: White Tea & Ginger
items.description: White tea is the dominant note, with soft floral undertones and spicy ginger providing supporting warmth. The overall character is clean, herbal, and light—refreshing with a subtle sophistication.

items.label: Sweet Honeysuckle
items.description: Honeysuckle dominates as the floral note, delivering an authentic bloom character. The scent is sweet and captivating, with a fresh, botanical character that evokes the experience of being surrounded by flowering vines.

items.label: Champaca Neroli Twist
items.description: Built on woody and floral notes with citrus elements including orange blossom, vanilla, and dry sage. The overall character is masculine, balancing floral brightness with grounding woody and herbal qualities.

items.label: Sweet Grass
items.description: Fruity top notes of pineapple, strawberry, melon, and citrus, followed by mid-notes of dry grass, jasmine, and lavender with a white musk base. The scent is sweet and earthy with subtle almond or vanilla-like qualities.

items.label: Patchouli Saffron
items.description: Patchouli dominates, balanced with saffron as the secondary element and complemented by lemon and rose undertones. The fragrance is earthy yet light and airy rather than heavy, with a clean, unisex character.

items.label: Magnolia Blush
items.description: Violet and carnation form the primary notes, complemented by subtle hints of citrus and sandalwood. The overall character is delicate and light, described as flirty with a non-overpowering presence that carries a feminine quality.

items.label: Blushing Cherry Blossom
items.description: Dominant white floral character with cherry notes as a supporting element. The scent is feminine and refreshing with a romantic quality that evokes a summery, breezy atmosphere.

items.label: Spicy Geranium Verbena (all natural)
items.description: Fresh citrus top notes lead into sweet and spicy heart notes, followed by a woody patchouli base. The overall character is earthy and herbal with a distinctly spicy, masculine quality.

items.label: Rose Garden
items.description: Fresh rose dominates with grassy and citrus supporting elements, creating an outdoorsy, dewy garden character. Rather than powdery, this fragrance delivers a rose still on the vine with natural greenness.

items.label: Floral
items.description: Honeysuckle and white flower form the primary character, with jasmine, rose, geranium, and gardenia in the middle notes. The base combines white musk, woody, and raspberry elements for a powdery and floral overall profile.

items.label: Merlot Wine
items.description: Rich cherry and plum dominate with a crisp, lightly alcoholic character. The scent profile emphasizes fruit-forward sweetness with subtle wine undertones and a fresh, slightly boozy quality.

items.label: Cactus Flower
items.description: Sweet desert wildflower features hints of herbs, spices, and cool greens as supporting notes with a woody base. The scent balances floral sweetness with earthy undertones, creating a simultaneously feminine and mysterious character.

items.label: Honeysuckle Nectar
items.description: Dominant honeysuckle provides a fresh, floral quality, while white musk and fruity elements create a sweet, slightly creamy foundation. The overall scent combines fresh florals with a warm, approachable sweetness.

items.label: Sweet Pea and Ivy
items.description: Juniper and ylang-ylang top notes with floral middle notes, supported by a dry herb base. The scent combines soft, fruity elements with fresh green ivy characteristics, creating a fresh and mellow floral profile.

items.label: Violet
items.description: Powdery floral violet dominates, with woody vanilla as the base. The overall character is sophisticated and soapy, described as slightly sweet and slightly musky with a powdery dry-down.

items.label: Tobacco Flower
items.description: Floral blend as the dominant character with an accent of fresh tobacco leaf. The composition is soft and powdery yet fragrant, creating an overall impression that is warm, clean, and slightly woody.

items.label: Pikake PF
items.description: Orange blossom dominates as the floral note, complemented by a vanilla base that adds sweetness. The overall character is a delicate floral scent with a little bit of sweetness, evoking a tropical, honey-powdery quality.

items.label: White Pepper Lavender
items.description: Lavender is the dominant note, with white pepper providing a spicy top note that reduces the scent's medicinal quality, supported by a woody base. The fragrance has a clean, herbaceous character with slightly spicy and sophisticated undertones.

items.label: French Market
items.description: This floral fragrance opens with sweet peach and exotic ylang ylang as dominant top notes, transitions through tuberose and precious florals in the middle, and settles into a sweet vanilla base. The overall character is a strong, spicy floral with a balanced sweetness throughout.

items.label: Cabernet & Neroli
items.description: This fragrance leads with fruity notes of wild grape, cherry, and strawberry reminiscent of cabernet wine. The middle develops with fresh apple, orange blossom, and plum, settling into a delicate vanilla base.

items.label: Casa Blanca Lily
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant lily note that is soothing and sweet with a true-to-life floral character. The scent profile is soft and gentle, emphasizing the natural lily flower's delicate qualities.

items.label: Carby Musk
items.description: This fragrance is ambergris-forward with powdery oakmoss undertones and musky base notes, creating a scent profile reminiscent of high-end cologne. The composition layers floral and amber elements with marine hints, delivering a sweet yet sophisticated fragrance.

items.label: Jungle Gardenia II
items.description: This fragrance features a gardenia-based floral composition with fresh orange notes that add brightness. The orange provides a zesty, citrus element that contrasts with the soft floral gardenia heart.

items.label: Calla Lily
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant white floral character with notes of melon, lily of the valley, rose, and violet. The composition creates an elegant, balanced profile that is sweet without being cloying.

items.label: The Vert
items.description: The dominant note is fresh bergamot and lemon zest, creating a bright citrus foundation. Supporting notes include tender green tea leaves, island blossoms, and crisp white musk that add delicate floral and musky undertones.

items.label: Earth's Element
items.description: The fragrance opens with citrus notes of orange and lemon, followed by floral middle notes of rose and lily of the valley. The base combines spice, amber, woods, and patchouli for an earthy, grounded finish.

items.label: Juicy Neroli
items.description: This fragrance features tart and juicy grapefruit and lemon as the dominant top notes, complemented by sweet pineapple and jasmine in the middle, resting on a white musk base. The overall character is bright, fruity, and fresh.

items.label: Royal Orchid
items.description: Royal Orchid opens with peach blossom top notes, transitions through a floral heart of rose and jasmine, and settles into an ambery white musk base. The overall profile is sweet, exotic, and decidedly floral.

items.label: Wild Orchid and White Tea
items.description: This fragrance features light, fresh, and clean florals with herbal white tea leaves as its primary character. The white tea provides a delicate herbal foundation while the orchid delivers a subtle floral prominence.

items.label: Patchouli Zest
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by a strong, earthy patchouli base with supporting notes of mint and citrus that provide a subtle brightness. The overall character is heavy on the patchouli with a grounding, woody profile.

items.label: Iris PF
items.description: This fragrance features a delicate floral profile dominated by violet rather than true iris, creating a powdery, feminine impression. The scent carries soft, dewy qualities with an overall light and pleasant character.

items.label: Smoldering Patchouli
items.description: This fragrance features a smoky, incense-forward profile with patchouli as the dominant note, complemented by vetiver and cedarwood in the base. The overall character is woody, earthy, and deep with a distinctive smoldering quality.

items.label: Jasmine (all natural)
items.description: This fragrance features uplifting jasmine as the dominant note, complemented by lemon and vanilla, with heliotrope in the middle and ylang ylang in the base. The overall character is fresh and sweet with floral qualities.

items.label: Mango Beachwood
items.description: This fragrance opens with honeyed fruit and cream notes, creating a fruity sweetness in the top layer. The middle develops with spicy ginger and anise, while the base settles into sugary vanilla.

items.label: Tomato Flower
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant rose-like floral note with herbaceous green undertones and subtle yellow fruit accords, creating a fresh garden scent. The overall character is fresh, green and slightly sweet with an earthy quality.

items.label: Nectarine & White Ginger
items.description: This fragrance combines spicy ginger with sweet nectarine as its primary notes, creating a citrus and earthy composition. The scent is characterized as refreshing and bright with a clean, crisp quality.

items.label: Wild Berry Tulips
items.description: This fragrance opens with sweet, sun-ripened berries as the dominant note, complemented by floral tones from freshly blooming flowers in the middle and base. The overall character is fresh and fruity with a delicate floral backdrop.

items.label: White Gardenia (all natural)
items.description: This fragrance opens with citrus top notes of mandarin, orange, and lemon blossom, then transitions to a floral heart of gardenia, neroli, and clove leaf. The base of Egyptian jasmine, heliotrope, and sandalwood creates a soft, warm floral composition.

items.label: Forget Me Not Blossoms
items.description: This fragrance features white floral and fruity top notes, primarily pear and citrus, with a heart of white rose, precious florals, and gardenia. The base combines amber and musk for a soft, delicate finish.

items.label: Sandalwood Rose (all natural)
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by creamy sandalwood, which is enhanced with rose and vanilla flower notes, finishing with cedar in the base. The overall character is warm and floral with subtle vanilla sweetness.

items.label: Bouquet Collection
items.description: This collection features six distinct floral fragrances with varying profiles. The dominant notes include rose, peony, honeysuckle, gardenia, jasmine, lavender, and lilac, each complemented by supporting florals.

items.label: Red Clover Tea
items.description: Red clover provides the dominant fresh note, complemented by a subtle berry undertone that adds sweetness. The overall character is sophisticated and delicately sweet with a clean, floral quality.

items.label: Rosé (all natural)
items.description: Ripe strawberry and sparkling champagne dominate, supported by lime fizz, tangerine, and coconut water. The overall character is light, refreshing, and fruity-fizzy with a slightly sweet, bubbly quality.

items.label: Lavender Cedarwood
items.description: Lavender dominates the middle notes, complemented by citrus top notes and a patchouli-based foundation with cedar leaf, rose, lilac, and mossy elements. The blend is sophisticated and woody with floral characteristics.

items.label: Mandarin Frankincense
items.description: Grapefruit and lemon brightness open the composition, with gardenia blossoms in the middle and frankincense grounding it with a warm, precious base. The overall character is fresh yet sophisticated, balancing zesty citrus with calming, earthy resin.

items.label: Goji Berry
items.description: Authentic goji berry provides the primary characteristic with zesty, sweet elements creating a fruity composition with bright, tangy qualities balanced by subtle sweetness. The overall character is fresh and fruity with typical berry brightness.

items.label: Eucalyptus And Cotton
items.description: Eucalyptus and peppermint open the composition, transitioning through gardenia and cotton accords, settling into a base of musk, sandalwood, and ylang ylang. The overall character is clean and revitalizing with spa-like freshness balanced by soft floral and musky undertones.

items.label: Rose Black Currant (all natural)
items.description: Rich black currant base with wild berry as the top note and mixed florals in the middle, finishing with vanilla bean undertones and supporting notes of pear, peach, rose, and raspberry. The overall character is a full-bodied, complex fruit-forward scent with floral and vanilla warmth.

items.label: Brazilian Waterfall
items.description: White floral notes of water lily, gardenia, and jasmine dominate, with peach providing freshness at the top and vanilla grounding the composition in the base. Overall, it presents as a fresh, watery tropical floral with sweet undertones.

items.label: Dahlia Hibiscus
items.description: Pineapple and ylang ylang top notes lead to jasmine and orange blossom in the middle, finishing with sugary musk and woody base notes. The overall profile is a sweet fruity floral composition with tropical and musky undertones.

items.label: French Lavender
items.description: Lavender dominates with the characteristic floral profile of Provence's meadows, carrying a calming, herbaceous quality with a soft, naturally dry character. The overall impression is fresh and relaxing rather than sweet or heavily perfumed.

items.label: Guilty (our version of Gucci)
items.description: Pink pepper and mandarin orange open the composition, followed by floral and fruity middle notes of lilac, peach, and jasmine, settling into a base of patchouli, amber, and vanilla. The overall character is seductive and contemporary with balanced citrus brightness and sensual warmth.

items.label: Green Pearl Jasmine
items.description: Fresh grass top note transitions into mixed floral middle notes of jasmine, rose, and gardenia, with a balsam woods base evoking the scent of fresh-cut grass and melon. The overall profile is light and botanical with a fresh green outdoorsy character.

items.label: Sea Salt And Lily
items.description: The fragrance opens with bright lime and floral notes, centered around magnolia and lily of the valley in the heart, finishing with a soft musk base. The overall profile is fresh and breezy with delicate floral character.

items.label: Kudzu Blossom
items.description: A ripe grape note dominates supported by fresh citrus at the top and jasmine in the base, creating a full and fruity scent profile with floral undertones.

items.label: Fiji
items.description: Water orchid and green coconut are the primary notes, supported by kiwi blossom, Tahitian vanilla, pineapple, frangipani and amber. The overall character is a fresh, fruity floral blend with tropical and sweet qualities.

items.label: Into The Night (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Dark raspberry dominates the top note with rose petals and jasmine in the heart, grounded by amber, patchouli, and mocha musk at the base. The overall character is luxurious and sultry, combining fruit-forward sweetness with earthy, warm undertones.

items.label: Oatmeal Milk and Honey
items.description: Honey dominates with creamy milk and warm oats complementing the sweetness. The overall character is warm and sweet, described as "simply delicious" with a profile that works particularly well in cold process soaps.

items.label: Midnight Vanilla
items.description: Vanilla serves as the dominant note, complemented by a soft amber base and musky undertones described as "cozy & warm vanilla with a soft amber base." The scent profile is elegant and sophisticated with a smooth, non-aggressive character.

items.label: Bay Rum
items.description: Rum dominates as the primary note, complemented by jasmine, citrus, and sparks of hearty spice. The scent has a warm, exotic, and distinctly masculine character that is rich and timeless.

items.label: Vanilla Non Discoloring
items.description: Vanilla dominates with supporting hints of fruit, floral, and coconut undertones creating a complex vanilla experience. The overall character is warm with a savory quality rather than a sweet bakery profile.

items.label: Buttercream Icing
items.description: Buttery cream dominates, complemented by vanilla and powdered sugar with a subtle lemon undertone. The overall character is sweet and gourmand, evoking the aroma of birthday cake frosting with creamy, sugary characteristics.

items.label: Apricot & Peach
items.description: Peach dominates with supporting apricot notes, complemented by undertones of pear, plum, and jasmine. The overall character is fresh and fruity with a zesty, refreshing quality and a somewhat sweet profile.

items.label: Vanilla Butter (all natural)
items.description: Rich vanilla dominates with supporting notes of sweet coconut and creamy butter, creating "a sugary blend" with an overall gourmand character. The scent profile is warm and sweet, reminiscent of frosting or dessert-inspired compositions.

items.label: Coconut Ginger Almond (all natural)
items.description: Ginger and lime serve as primary notes with coconut, almond, and vanilla providing warm base notes. The overall profile is described as "fresh, clean" with a "calm, and polished" character that balances brightness with warmth.

items.label: Almond Coconut Milk
items.description: Dominant almond extract note with supporting creamy coconut milk and sweet vanilla undertones. The overall character is sugary and nutty, creating a warm and comforting scent profile.

items.label: Coffee Beans
items.description: Brewed coffee dominates as the primary note with light hints of vanilla providing sweetness in the base. The overall character is potent and strong, leaning sweet rather than bitter, with a subtle creamy quality.

items.label: Apple Fresh Green
items.description: Crisp green apple is the dominant note, complemented by supporting notes of grape and pear with a light musky base. The overall character is fresh and juicy with a clean, fruity profile.

items.label: Bali Mango
items.description: Tropical mango and tangerine are the primary notes, with crisp apple and pomegranate providing a refreshing base. The overall character is bright and fresh with sweet tropical qualities.

items.label: Strawberry Champagne
items.description: Champagne and white wine are the dominant notes, supported by soft fruits and white florals creating a fresh, crisp composition. The scent balances sweet elements with a clean, airy character.

items.label: Brown Sugar & Fig
items.description: Ripe fig and caramelized brown sugar are dominant, complemented by creamy coconut milk and soft velvet musk. This creates a warm, sweet, and comforting scent profile with both indulgent and subtle characteristics.

items.label: Authentic Cocoa
items.description: Cocoa powder is the dominant note, delivering a warm chocolate scent with subtle undertones of honey in the base. The overall character is rich, soft, and dessert-like.

items.label: Vanilla Black Currant (all natural)
items.description: Fruity black currant and raspberry are dominant notes, complemented by vanilla and citrus undertones. The scent profile is warm, fruity, and floral with a fresh citrus quality, presenting as a sweet, bright berry fragrance with creamy vanilla undertones.

items.label: Applejack and Orange Peel
items.description: Green apple opens the composition and transitions to orange peel, creating a bright citrus blend. The overall character is zesty and fresh with a calming quality that develops as the scent evolves.

items.label: Aruba Coconut
items.description: Creamy coconut is the dominant note, complemented by tropical fruit notes of mango and apple with a white musk base. Overall, it delivers a fresh, tropical character reminiscent of an island vacation.

items.label: Sexy Cinnamon Clove
items.description: Cinnamon is the dominant note combined with clove, creating a warm and spicy profile. The scent evokes festive and seasonal characteristics with an overall warm, aromatic character reminiscent of holiday spice blends.

items.label: Honey
items.description: Honey is the dominant note with floral undertones of honeysuckle and sweet alyssum, plus subtle fruity or peppery supporting notes. The overall character is sweet with a slightly bitter finish.

items.label: Banana
items.description: Authentic and fresh banana is the dominant note with a pronounced candy-like character evoking banana Laffy Taffy candy. The scent is sweet with a strong throw and blends well with complementary fruit scents.

items.label: Blueberry Pancakes
items.description: Warm, baked blueberries are the dominant note with a pronounced maple syrup undertone. Supporting notes include brown sugar sweetness that creates a realistic baked goods character with a sweet, warm, and gourmand profile.

items.label: Maple Cream
items.description: Syrupy, sweet maple notes are dominant with a soft, warm vanilla base. The scent has a creamy, dessert-like character with butterscotch undertones, presenting as a warm, gourmand fragrance.

items.label: Strawberry Milkshake
items.description: Strawberry is the dominant note with creamy vanilla undertones creating a dessert-like character. The overall profile is sweet, gourmand, and smooth.

items.label: Snickers Coffee
items.description: Fresh roasted coffee is the dominant note, complemented by creamy caramel and chocolate undertones. The blend creates a warm, indulgent character with a sweet, dessert-like quality.

items.label: Chocolate Mint
items.description: Peppermint is the dominant note, which combines with rich chocolate, honey, and vanilla in the base. The fragrance has a sweet, creamy character with a cool finish that balances the warmer chocolate undertones.

items.label: Fruit Loops
items.description: Fruity sweetness designed to evoke breakfast cereal is the dominant character. The scent blends multiple fruit notes with a subtle vanilla undertone, creating an overall playful, sweet, and nostalgic profile.

items.label: Turkish Mocha
