items.description: Chocolate and coffee are the dominant notes, with supporting layers of creamy maple butter, nutmeg, orange, coconut, and cocoa. The overall character is warm, spicy, and sweet with a sugary vanilla base.

items.label: Raspberry Sorbet
items.description: Juicy fresh raspberries are the dominant note, complemented by cool citrus lemon in supporting roles. The overall character is fruity and refreshing with a slightly tart quality.

items.label: Butterscotch Cookie Dough
items.description: Butterscotch is the dominant note with supporting notes of vanilla and cream. The scent has a sweet, dessert-like character with subtle complexity from layered vanilla undertones.

items.label: Moscato
items.description: Fruity peaches, pineapple, and apple are the dominant notes with light floral notes in the middle, finishing with a sugary vanilla base. The overall character is sweet and fruity with delicate floral undertones.

items.label: Salted Caramel
items.description: Cherry, maple, and spicy notes combine with a sandalwood vanilla base, creating a warm and sweet profile reminiscent of fall treats and bakery scents.

items.label: Dr Pepper
items.description: Cola is the dominant note with spiced and vanilla undertones. The overall character is sweet and slightly spiced, capturing the distinctive profile of the popular soft drink.

items.label: Malibu Rum Cupcakes
items.description: Soft vanilla is the dominant note, complemented by spice and coconut undertones reminiscent of rum. The scent is described as warm with a rich, dessert-like character with tropical and baking spice elements.

items.label: Banana Nutbread
items.description: Banana is the dominant note, supported by sweet coconut, walnut, vanilla, and musk in the base. The overall character is warm and fruity with a sweet, bakery-like quality.

items.label: Roasted Oatmeal Stout
items.description: Oatmeal and creamy notes dominate, with supporting almond, maple, and roasted character. The overall impression is sweet and bakery-like, reminiscent of fresh oatmeal cookies with warm, toasty undertones.

items.label: Sparkling Ginger
items.description: Crisp ginger note dominates with hints of lime citrus adding brightness and freshness. The overall profile is clean, zippy, and refreshing with a subtle sweetness.

items.label: Brownie Batter
items.description: Dominant chocolate note closely mimics actual brownie batter with creamy and sweet supporting notes. Rich, fudgy undertones deliver an indulgent bakery-inspired profile with slightly powdery quality.

items.label: Coconut Macaroon
items.description: Sweet, creamy coconut as the primary note with buttery top notes and burnt sugar supporting it. Vanilla-coconut base creates a rich, dessert-like, and indulgent character.

items.label: Peach Cilantro
items.description: Peach dominates complemented by strawberry, jasmine, and soft white musky base with herbal undertones. The scent profile is green, herbaceous, and fruity with a balanced fresh character.

items.label: Cranberry Cobbler PF
items.description: Sweetened cranberry dominates as the primary note with fresh pastry crust as the supporting element. The overall character is warm and bakery-like, evoking comfort of a homemade dessert.

items.label: Pecan Pie
items.description: Dominant pecan pie scent with warm vanilla base creating an overall sweet and baked character. Captures the aroma of freshly baked dessert with nutty warmth and gourmand sweetness.

items.label: Hansel and Gretel
items.description: Gingerbread-forward scent with prominent vanilla, cinnamon, and clove notes, rounded out by coconut and maple undertones. Warm, sugary, and spice-laden character reminiscent of holiday baking.

items.label: Butterscotch
items.description: Dominant butterscotch note with caramel candy undertones enriched by cinnamon and maple base notes. Overall character is decidedly sweet and gourmand with warm, buttery richness.

items.label: Chocolate Sugar Cookies
items.description: Sweet sugar cookie fragrance with chocolate as the dominant note creating a dessert-like scent profile. Combines sweetness of sugar cookies with smooth chocolate tones producing warm and gourmand character.

items.label: Captain Crunch Berry
items.description: Strawberry and vanilla dominate as primary notes with pie crust and sugary elements creating a sweet, slightly salty character. Mimics breakfast cereal with balanced sweetness and baked goods undertone.

items.label: Oatmeal Cookie Dough
items.description: Creamy cookie dough dominates with supporting vanilla and soft oats notes. The overall character is warm and dessert-like, evoking freshly baked cookie aromas.

items.label: Lime Margarita
items.description: Prominent lime and coconut notes dominate with lemon peel undertones creating a citrus-forward profile. Balances sweet tropical elements with bright, zesty accords and candy-like sweetness.

items.label: Coffee Cake and Spice
items.description: Rich, buttery coffee cake dominates with cinnamon and spice in the middle notes and warm vanilla providing a nutty base. Overall character is warm, bakery-like, and comforting with sweet spiced undertones.

items.label: Grape Soda
items.description: Dominant concord grape note surrounded by lemon, lime, strawberry, and powdery raspberry. Creates a fizzy, fresh scent profile with fruity character throughout.

items.label: White Citrus Pineapple
items.description: Top notes of complex citrus and pineapple with amber base create a light and fresh scent profile. Citrus notes dominate with balancing sweetness from pineapple on the dry down.

items.label: Blue Slushy
items.description: Dominant blue raspberry note with sugary character throughout like a real, blue raspberry, sugary slushy. Overall character is playful and candy-like with strong projection.

items.label: Coconut Milk
items.description: Creamy coconut as the primary note complemented by subtle fruity undertones and prominent vanilla base. Overall character is soothing and milky with soft, comforting sweetness.

items.label: Creamy Rootbeer Float
items.description: Dominant root beer note complemented by vanilla ice cream, anise, and orange. The scent has a sweet, creamy character with spiced undertones from the prominent anise component.

items.label: Banana's Flambe
items.description: Dominant banana note combined with rum, caramelized sugar, and vanilla cream undertones. Evokes bananas Foster with a baked, dessert-like character that is warm and indulgent rather than artificial.

items.label: Blueberry Tea
items.description: Dominant blueberry note with prominent floral tea undertones balancing strong, sugary berries with freshly brewed tea elements. Clean and refreshing profile without bakery sweetness.

items.label: Dr Pepper Cherry Vanilla
items.description: Sweet Dr. Pepper soda dominates with enhanced cherry and vanilla supporting notes. The cherry and vanilla amplify the vanilla base creating a sweeter profile with candy-like, fruity and warm vanilla characteristics.

items.label: Lucky Charms
items.description: Powdery, fruity blend captures the essence of breakfast cereal with sweet fruity notes complemented by powdery undertones. Playful, sweet, and somewhat nostalgic fragrance.

items.label: Cherry Almond
items.description: Cherry and almond notes dominate in the middle with bright citrus and fruit opening notes of lemon and apple. Settles into warm base of ylang, musk, and vanilla creating overall sweet and nutty character.

items.label: Vibrant Orchid Blueberry
items.description: Floral and fruity notes feature wild blueberry, bright grapefruit, and ripe pear supported by creamy, woody, and rich amber base. Fresh and floral profile with subtle sweet fruity undertones.

items.label: Sugar Cookie
items.description: Buttercream and coconut notes blend into a maple vanilla base. The overall profile evokes the warm, sweet character of freshly baked sugar cookies with a baked-goods quality that feels comforting and gourmand.

items.label: Saronno Amaretto II PF
items.description: Amaretto dominates with supporting accents of sweet cherry, vanilla, and buttercream. The overall character is nutty and fruity with a sugary, creamy quality delivering a warm, dessert-like scent profile.

items.label: White Chocolate Cherry w/ Nuts
items.description: Maraschino cherry dominates, complemented by milk chocolate, vanilla, and nutty undertones. The overall character is sweet and creamy with a gourmand quality.

items.label: Rainkissed Mimosa
items.description: Green, earthy floral profile centered on cucumber and mimosa notes creates a fresh, clean scent that remains subtle and not overpowering. The overall character is light and spring-like with a watery, garden-fresh quality.

items.label: Orange Chiffon Cake PF
items.description: Buttercream, maple, and orange top notes transition through cinnamon and floral middle notes into a sugary vanilla and tonka bean base. Overall, this is a dessert-inspired scent with a realistic cake-like quality.

items.label: Coco Puffs (our version of)
items.description: Chocolate note mimics the scent of Coco Puffs cereal, balancing cocoa sweetness with subtle grain undertones. The overall character is distinctly sweet and gourmand, with a realistic, non-overpowering intensity.

items.label: Bakery Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: Collection features six distinct bakery-inspired fragrances: Brownie Batter leads with chocolate and cream notes, while Coconut Macaroon emphasizes sweet coconut with burnt sugar undertones. Overall delivers warm, gourmand, and sugary characteristics.

items.label: Coffee Shop Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: Collection features six complementary fragrances with coffee and chocolate as dominant notes, supported by spice, vanilla, and caramel undertones. Overall, the collection evokes warm, cozy, and indulgent characters reminiscent of a café environment.

items.label: Raspberry Porter
items.description: Raspberry dominates with berry wine undertones and a citrus accent that creates an effervescent quality. The overall character is fresh and fruity, delivering a bright, fruity profile with subtle complexity.

items.label: Cran-Grape
items.description: Grape dominates as the primary note with cranberry as a supporting element. The profile is sweet, sharp, fresh, and fruity with grape-forward character, resembling grape soda.

items.label: Warm Vanilla Gingerbread
items.description: Vanilla dominates the base, complemented by spicy ginger in the middle and bright orange peel with cinnamon at the top. The overall character is warm and fresh, evoking the aroma of freshly baked gingerbread with sweet spice undertones.

items.label: Pink Peppercorn
items.description: Pink peppercorn dominates, complemented by eucalyptus and orange accents creating a rich, earthy pepper blend. Overall, this is an earthy, spiced fragrance with citrus brightness.

items.label: Strawberry Cheesecake
items.description: Juicy, jammy strawberry dominates, supported by cheesecake in the middle and grounded by vanilla at the base. The overall character is sweet and dessert-like, evoking the flavor of strawberry cheesecake.

items.label: Vanilla Cone
items.description: Vanilla dominates with a buttery-rich character that provides sweetness and depth, supported by gourmand elements adding complexity. Overall, the scent profile is warm, sweet, and indulgent with a sophisticated gourmand character.

items.label: Sweet Shop Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: Collection comprises six individual fragrances with dominant notes ranging across fruit (pineapple, banana, strawberry, grape), candy/sugar elements, and vanilla. Overall character spans playful and nostalgic to warm and dessert-like.

items.label: Macintosh Apple
items.description: Apple dominates in the heart, supported by pear at the top and a green base. The overall character is fresh and fruity with a crisp, herbal finish.

items.label: Popcorn (our version of)
items.description: Buttery popcorn dominates, creating a realistic, mouth-watering scent profile with buttery, mouth-watering goodness. The overall character is sweet and gourmand, accurately replicating the aroma of freshly popped popcorn.

items.label: Hot Cinnamon Blend (not skin safe)
items.description: Cinnamon dominates, creating a spicy warm blend with sweet undertones. The overall character is warm and aromatic, capturing a traditional cinnamon scent profile suitable for applications like potpourri and industrial uses.

items.label: Creme Brulee
items.description: Caramel dominates, supported by sugary vanilla in the middle, with a nutty maple base. This fragrance presents a warm, dessert-inspired composition with a crunchy, spiced character reminiscent of the classic French confection.

items.label: Grandma's House Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: Collection contains six fragrance oils with distinct profiles ranging from warm baked goods like Banana Nutbread featuring banana and musk, to fruity Blueberry Pancakes with maple notes, to dessert-inspired fragrances like Sugar Cookie and Dutch Apple Pie. Overall, the collection evokes nostalgic, sweet, and warm comfort scents.

items.label: Pink Mimosa
items.description: Opens with orange and tropical juiciness, develops through berry notes in the middle, and settles on a base of musk and vanilla. The overall character is indulgent and fruity with creamy undertones.

items.label: Carrot Cake
items.description: Sweet orange dominates the top note, followed by a mixed spice middle note, with vanilla and caramel as the base. The overall character is warm and gourmand, evoking a freshly baked dessert with buttery, creamy, and spiced qualities.

items.label: Wicked Green Apple
items.description: Tart green apple dominates, enhanced by floral middle notes of violet, jasmine, and rose. The base features musk, creating a scent that blends fruity tartness with floral sophistication and depth.

items.label: Watermelon Basil
items.description: Ripe melon dominates the top note, with basil in the middle and mint as the base, creating a fresh and sweet aromatic profile. The combination evokes a cool, herbaceous character balanced with juicy fruit elements.

items.label: Citron And Mandarin
items.description: Citron and mandarin form the heart, supported by zesty top notes of pine, pineapple, and grapefruit, with a base of raspberry and musk. The overall character is fresh and fruity with subtle warmth from the musk base.

items.label: Caramel Nut Muffin
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant buttercream top note, with maple in the middle and a base of cinnamon and vanilla. The overall character is a warm, sweet bakery scent with nutty undertones.

items.label: Cucumber Cilantro
items.description: This fragrance features a fresh, vegetable-forward profile with cucumber, cilantro and sweet watermelon as primary notes. The composition moves from citrus at the top through melon in the middle to cilantro at the base, creating a crisp and herbaceous character overall.

items.label: Saltwater Taffy
items.description: This fragrance features a creamy fruity blend with mixed berries as the top note, coconut in the middle, and vanilla cream as the base. The overall character is sweet and dessert-like, reminiscent of classic saltwater taffy candy.

items.label: Strawberry Poundcake
items.description: The fragrance's dominant note is strawberry, complemented by shortcake in the middle and whipped cream with vanilla base notes. Overall, it has a sugary-sweet bakery character that is fresh and dessert-like.

items.label: Crushed Candy Cane
items.description: This fragrance oil's dominant peppermint note combines with sugar crystal and vanilla bean accents, creating a sweet, candy-like holiday scent with cool, minty character balanced by warm vanilla undertones.

items.label: Oregano
items.description: The fragrance is built around wild oregano as its dominant note, with supporting herbal elements of lavender and clary sage, grounded by vetiver and cedarwood in the base. It presents as an aromatic, herbaceous scent with peppery spice and earthy woody characteristics, offering a refined Mediterranean profile.

items.label: Baby Powder
items.description: This fragrance oil delivers the classic, fresh, powdery baby scent. The dominant note is a soft, clean powder accord that evokes traditional baby powder products. The overall character is fresh and comforting, with a light, airy quality typical of classic powder fragrances.

items.label: Clean Cotton
items.description: The dominant note is sun-dried cotton combined with green notes and zesty citrus creating an overall fresh and clean character. The scent evokes the aroma of fresh cotton sheets that have been line dried on a sunny summer day.

items.label: Cool Water
items.description: This fragrance opens with bergamot, fresh lime, and green top notes before transitioning to a heart of jasmine and sweet orange. The composition settles into a cool, eucalyptus-tinged base, creating an overall masculine and refreshing profile with a slightly powdery character.

items.label: Ocean Breeze
items.description: The scent profile features white musk as the dominant note, creating a clean and fresh composition with subtle musky undertones. The overall character is crisp and refreshing, appealing to a broad audience and described as relaxing and very refreshing.

items.label: Fresh Linen
items.description: Fresh Linen is described as a sunny, crisp, and clean scent. The fragrance evokes a laundry-like freshness with strong projection and staying power. Its character is calming yet potent, balancing gentle cleanliness with noticeable intensity.

items.label: April Fresh Downy
items.description: This fragrance oil delivers a fresh, clean, floral scent reminiscent of laundry detergent. The composition emphasizes bright, airy florals with clean undertones that evoke commercial fabric care products. The overall character is light, crisp, and domestic.

items.label: Spa
items.description: This fragrance combines herbaceous mint and green notes as its dominant elements, with supporting jasmine and gardenia florals. The overall character is fresh, clean, and meditative with a subtle powdered finish.

items.label: Aqua
items.description: This fragrance features citrus and fruit notes at the top, transitioning to white floral middle notes, with a base of warm, musky, and vanilla undertones. The overall character is described as clean and fresh, presenting a bright, unisex aquatic profile.

items.label: Cotton Blossom
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant fresh, clean linen note reminiscent of cotton fabric drying in the breeze. It has a crisp, airy character with subtle floral undertones. The overall impression is light and fresh rather than sweet or heavy.

items.label: Sea Island Cotton
items.description: This fragrance combines pure, white cotton with fresh ocean air in a clean and crisp scent. The dominant note is clean linen, supported by subtle aquatic elements, creating an overall fresh and airy character with a hint of floral undertones.

items.label: Sunset White Amber
items.description: This fragrance features warm amber as its dominant note, complemented by soft white floral accords. The overall character is warm and balanced, neither too strong nor too mild, with a lingering quality that makes it suitable for multiple applications.

items.label: Old Spice Fresh
items.description: This fragrance opens with bright citrus notes of orange and lime, complemented by floral lily of the valley and cooling mint in the heart. The base features earthy patchouli with mossy and musky undertones, creating a masculine and fresh overall character.

items.label: Waterblown Cotton
items.description: Waterblown Cotton Fragrance Oil has a fresh cotton scent as its dominant note, with supporting hints of earthy, misty waterfall elements. The overall character is clean and crisp, resembling fresh line-dried linens with a slightly powdery quality.

items.label: Tide Ultra
items.description: This fragrance features a clean laundry character dominated by fresh floral and citrus notes. The scent profile includes cherry, lemon, ylang-ylang, and salty sea air, creating a warm, powdery impression reminiscent of dried fabrics. The overall character is fresh and comforting, evoking the sensation of crisp linens.

items.label: Ivory Soap PF
items.description: This fragrance features a clean and fresh profile reminiscent of classic bar soap, with powdery and slightly sweet supporting notes creating an overall character that's light and soapy. The scent reads as gentle, mild, and universally approachable rather than bold or complex.

items.label: Frozen
items.description: This fragrance features cool mint as its dominant note, complemented by earthy undertones, eucalyptus, jasmine, and rose. The overall character is crisp and clean with a fresh ocean breeze quality.

items.label: Ocean Salt & Driftwood
items.description: The dominant note is a bracing sea salt and coastal air combination, supported by cedar leaf, sea lavender, and blue sage in the middle notes, with weathered driftwood and beach grass providing a woody base. The overall character is refreshing and invigorating with a clean, slightly masculine profile.

items.label: Spring Green
items.description: Pine is the dominant note in this fragrance, complemented by rosewood and patchouli with a subtle effervescent lemon-like quality. The overall character is crisp, clean, and fresh, reminiscent of dew-kissed grass on a spring morning without being sweet or heavy.

items.label: Waterfall
items.description: This fragrance features fresh orange and green melon as the primary notes, with rose and mint in the heart, grounded by a warm sandalwood base. The overall character is described as crisp and sparkling, offering a fresh and clean aromatic profile.

items.label: Thor Fragrance Oil
items.description: Dominant mint note with supporting herbals of lavender and patchouli, creating a clean and crisp overall character. The scent is fresh and herbal with woody undertones. Reviewers describe it as having a woodsy peppermint quality suitable for both men and women.

items.label: Black Ice Fragrance Oil (Our Version of Little Trees)
items.description: Cool, strong masculine scent with lemon and lavender as top notes, musk in the middle, and cedarwood as the base. The overall character is fresh and woody with a crisp, clean profile.

items.label: Fresh and Clean Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: Fresh laundry and textile scents as dominant notes, with supporting citrus zests, powder, and cedarwood base notes. The overall character is clean, airy, and invigorating, evoking sun-dried linens and delicate florals.

items.label: Cedarwood Sage Fragrance Oil
items.description: Cedarwood base with sage in the middle notes, supported by green melon at the top and white florals including cyclamen, rose, and jasmine. The overall character is a delicate herbal and woods fragrance with soft, powdery qualities and a musky undertone.

items.label: Graphite Fragrance Oil (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Marine and citrus notes opening to herbal and fruity middle notes, settling into a woody base of cedar, vetiver, sandal, moss, musk, and amber. The overall character is fresh yet grounding.

items.label: Extra Fresh Fragrance Oil (our version of Dove)
items.description: Bright citrus and apple notes, supported by lavender and aromatic herbs in the heart, with cedar, sandalwood, and oakmoss providing a woody base. Overall character is fresh and clean with herbal-aromatic qualities.

items.label: Beachwood Fragrance Oil
items.description: Oceanic and tropical fruit notes opening, transitioning through floral middle notes, and settling into a warm base of dry woods, musk, and amber. The overall character is fresh yet warm, balancing bright citrus and fruity top notes with earthy, woody undertones.

items.label: Himalayan Bamboo Fragrance Oil
items.description: Marine, green scent dominated by bamboo and citrus notes, transitioning through floral elements of hyacinth and jasmine, and settling into a bamboo-based foundation. The overall character is fresh and slightly sweet with grassy, oceanic qualities.

items.label: Mojave Ghost Fragrance Oil (our version of Byredo)
items.description: Soft ambrette musk and sweet nesberry opening, transitioning through a powdery heart of violet and magnolia with saffron, and settling into a base of cedarwood, musk, and vetiver. The overall character is light and woody-floral with a gentle, powdery quality.

items.label: Gypsy Water Fragrance Oil (our version of Byredo)
items.description: Bright bergamot, lemon and juniper berry spiced with pepper opening, transitioning through a smoky incense and pine heart, and settling into a warm base of amber, sandalwood, and vanilla. The overall character is a woody aromatic with both fresh citrus brightness and deep, earthy warmth.

items.label: Lush Succulent Fragrance Oil
items.description: Crisp green and cucumber notes opening, then transitioning through honey and muguet in the heart, before settling into a base of sandalwood and musk. The overall character is fresh and clean with sweet floral undertones grounded in woody, earthy elements.

items.label: Bal d'Afrique Fragrance Oil (our version of Byredo)
items.description: Bright citrus and African marigold notes opening, transitioning to a floral heart of violet and cyclamen, before settling into a warm base of cedarwood and vetiver. The overall character is fresh and elegant, evolving from bright and exuberant to grounded and woody.

items.label: Resurrection Fragrance Oil (our version of Aesop)
items.description: Bright mandarin as the dominant top note, complemented by herbal rosemary and lavender in the middle, with a grounding cedarwood base. The overall character is invigorating and fresh, blending citrus brightness with clean herbal and woody undertones.

items.label: Blanche Fragrance Oil (our version of Byredo)
items.description: Clean aldehydes and rose as the dominant opening, with a heart of peony and violet, finishing with musk and sandalwood base notes. The overall character is pure and clean with a comforting quality reminiscent of fresh linens, creating a fresh and slightly floral scent profile.

items.label: Reverence Fragrance Oil (our version of Aesop)
items.description: Smoky vetiver as its dominant note, complemented by bright bergamot and green petitgrain in the middle layers. The overall character is boldly earthy and woody with a smoky quality.

items.label: Geranium Leaf Fragrance Oil (our version of Aesop)
items.description: Geranium leaf as its dominant middle note, supported by citrus top notes of bergamot and mandarin, with a musk base. The overall character is fresh and green with a revitalizing, herbaceous quality.

items.label: Bamboo Fragrance Oil (our version of NEST)
items.description: Crisp bamboo and cucumber notes opening, transitioning through white lotus and jasmine in the middle, and settling into a musk and green note base. The overall character is clean and spa-like with a fresh, botanical quality.

items.label: Casa Pacifica Fragrance Oil (our version of Voluspa)
items.description: Ocean breeze and citrus top notes, followed by water lily and marine accord in the middle, with driftwood and sea salt as the base. The overall character is fresh and aquatic with a salty, slightly woody undertone that evokes a seaside atmosphere.

items.label: Coriander Seed Fragrance Oil (our version of Aesop)
items.description: Black pepper as its dominant top note, with coriander seed in the middle and patchouli as the base. The overall character is a distinctive, warming aroma with spicy and earthy qualities.

items.label: Cucumber Melon Fragrance Oil (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Dominant melon note with fresh cucumber undertones, creating a clean and refreshing profile. The scent is fresh and clean, deliciously sweet, and refreshing, with an overall character that is light and summery rather than heavy or complex.

items.label: Monkey Farts Fragrance Oil
items.description: Tropical fruit notes with pineapple and banana as dominant scents, supported by apple and vanilla base notes. The overall character is fruity and fun, with a smooth finish.

items.label: Juicy Strawberry Fragrance Oil
items.description: Sweet strawberry fragrance with a sharp, fruity opening that mellows into warm berry notes. The scent has a realistic strawberry character like fresh picked strawberries with no chemical aftertaste. The overall profile is fresh, fruity, and summery.

items.label: Coconut Lime Verbena Fragrance Oil
items.description: Lime and coconut as the dominant notes, creating a tropical and citrusy composition. The scent emphasizes fresh lime with coconut undertones that remain balanced without overpowering. Overall, it has a bright, refreshing, and summery character.

items.label: Coconut Lemongrass Fragrance Oil
items.description: Lemongrass as the dominant fresh note, complemented by sweet and creamy coconut as supporting elements. The overall character is a charming blend that evokes tropical freshness, with a balanced, summery profile that is both clean and warm.

items.label: Pineapple Slices Fragrance Oil
items.description: Fresh, ripe pineapple as the dominant note with a sweet, juicy character. This tropical fragrance avoids artificial or overly sugary tones, delivering a sharp, sweet, tropical scent of freshly sliced pineapple. The overall impression is bright, uplifting, and true-to-fruit without cloying sweetness.

items.label: Brazilian Mango Grapefruit (all natural)
items.description: Tart grapefruit is the dominant note, complemented by sweet orange and sour lemon. A deeper citrus scent with floral base notes creates complexity and longevity. Overall character is fresh, tropical, and exotic.

items.label: Butt Naked
items.description: Fresh green apple, tart pineapple, juicy melon, and cherry pie top notes are balanced by a sugary vanilla base. Overall bright, fruity, and slightly tropical profile that is fresh rather than heavily sweet.

items.label: Dragons Blood
items.description: Opens with fresh orange and grape, developing into sensual clove and rose with a woody patchouli base. Overall character is rich, smooth, and deep, evoking a sensual, earthy quality with slight spice undertones.

items.label: Lemon Orange Blossom (all natural)
items.description: California lemon and sweet orange dominate as the top notes, creating a bright citrus profile. The blossom component provides subtle floral supporting notes. Overall character is fresh, clean, and uplifting with crisp citrus quality.

items.label: Lemon
items.description: Delivers a sweet, fresh, and sharp citrus scent with dominant lemon note. Has a pronounced cleaning-product quality rather than naturally fruity character, with strong sour top note. Overall profile is bright and synthetic rather than warm or resinous.

items.label: Orange Citrus
items.description: Bright, fresh orange zest is the dominant note with no other supporting notes beyond the citrus profile. Overall character is crisp and clean, resembling freshly peeled orange without additional complexity.

items.label: Watermelon (all natural)
items.description: Juicy, fruity dominant note with sweet characteristics that evoke eating fresh watermelon. Scent is described as fresh and crisp with a light, delicate quality that becomes more pronounced when added to water. Overall presents as summery and playful without chemical undertones.

items.label: Cranberry Spice
items.description: Fresh cranberry is the dominant note, complemented by citrus and spice accords. Overall character is warm and festive, with a spiced aromatic quality typical of holiday scents.

items.label: Black Fig and Honey
items.description: Dominant note is warm honey paired with ginger, creating a sweet and fruity character. These notes are grounded in a sugary vanilla base that adds depth and richness. Overall presents as intensely sweet with warm, comforting qualities.

items.label: Pomegranate Mango
items.description: Tropical, fruity composition with mango and pomegranate as the dominant notes. Features a sugary sweet vanilla bean base note that adds warmth and depth to the fruity character. Overall scent is fresh, sweet, and decidedly fruity.

items.label: Bartlett Pear
items.description: Fresh, crisp pear is the dominant note with supporting white floral base notes. Overall character is fresh and crisp with a clean, natural pear quality rather than overly sweet profile, resembling authentic pear rather than artificial interpretations.

items.label: Citrus Peel & Pine
items.description: Dominant blend of fresh citrus and soft forest pine with top notes including fir, lemon peel, tangerine, berry, violet, and camphor. Supported by earthy base notes of patchouli, tonka bean, and cedarwood. Overall scent profile is clean, fruity, and earthy with fresh, energizing character.

items.label: Pomegranate (all natural)
items.description: Sweet and fruity pomegranate scent with a hint of tropical melon as its primary character. Overall profile is predominantly sweet and fruity with subtle tropical undertones, with bubblegum-like sweetness rather than tart, tangy quality.

items.label: Lemon Sugar
items.description: Fresh, bright lemon is the dominant note, followed by a prominent sugary sweetness that adds a sharp note. Overall character is candy-like and sweet rather than crisp or energizing, leaning toward dessert-inspired rather than invigorating citrus.

items.label: Pineapple Mango
items.description: Opens with prominent pineapple notes paired with fresh mango, creating a tropical composition. A subtle floral undertone adds depth to the fruity profile. Overall character is fresh and sweet with a bright, summery quality.

items.label: Passionfruit & Guava
items.description: Tropical fruit is the dominant character with supporting notes of peach and pear creating sweetness, rounded out by jasmine for floral depth. Overall profile is exotic and lush with fresh, fruity tropical character.

items.label: Coconut Kiwi
items.description: Creamy coconut is the dominant note with juicy kiwi as a supporting note, creating an addicting tropical blend. Overall character is fresh, sweet, and candy-like with a light, refreshing quality suitable for warm weather products.

items.label: Blue Musk
items.description: Dominant note is musk, creating a soft and powdery profile. Supported by warm amber undertones, giving it a floral character. Overall scent presents as gentle, calming, and subtly sweet without being overpowering.

items.label: Tuscan Blood Orange 2
items.description: Leads with zesty blend of blood orange, grapefruit, and mandarin. Features supporting notes of melon, peach, and jasmine, with a base of white musk and woods. Overall character is fresh and citrus-forward with subtle floral and musky undertones.

items.label: Wild Watermelon
items.description: Dominant watermelon note described as juicy, sweet watermelon with a wild side. Scent has a candy-like character, compared to watermelon Jolly Ranchers. Overall presents as a playful, intensely fruity fragrance with sweet profile.

items.label: Honey Coco Mango
items.description: Dominant coconut note with supporting fruity accords of orange, melon, and mango, rounded out by an almond vanilla base. Overall character is sweet and tropical, reminiscent of a piña colada scent with pronounced sweetness.

items.label: Pear Vanilla
items.description: Ripe, juicy pear is the dominant note, complemented by sweetened vanilla in the base. Overall character is rich and sweet with a subtle balance between the fruity and creamy elements.

items.label: Capri Seaside Citrus
items.description: Dominated by citrus notes featuring grapefruit, bergamot, and nectarine that create a fruity, sweet composition. Overall character is fresh and exhilarating, with bright, clean quality that evokes a beachy, refreshing atmosphere.

items.label: Kiwi Watermelon
items.description: Dominant watermelon note with supporting kiwi accents, creating a watery, bright fruit blend with fresh, fruity character. Scent is crisp and summery, leaning toward candy-like sweetness based on customer comparisons to watermelon candy.

items.label: Citrus Grove
items.description: Tart citrus medley of fresh lemon, lime, and orange with a vanilla bean base. Combination creates a bright, citrus-forward profile that is fresh and not overpowering, with subtle earthy undertones reminiscent of orange groves in bloom.

items.label: Mulberry
items.description: Sweet, ripe berries with a fresh, bright fruity profile. Clean, uplifting character suitable for year-round use with subtle tropical fruit qualities.

items.label: Blue Hawaii
items.description: Fruity tropical top notes of mango and lime, followed by pineapple and jasmine, with a smooth coconut rum base and warm vanilla undertones.

items.label: Raspberry Lemonade
items.description: Citrusy lemon dominant note complemented by raspberry in the base. Sweet, citrusy profile creating a refreshing and bright character.

items.label: Cedar and Orange
items.description: Sparkling citrus dominant note with cedarwood base combining juicy orange brightness with intense cedar warmth. Sophisticated, slightly warm woody and citrusy profile.

items.label: Awapuhi Seaberry PF
items.description: Prominent fruity notes of pear and banana with jasmine and musk providing floral and musky base notes. Tropical and sweet with light, fruity character.

items.label: Honeydew (all natural)
items.description: Refreshing, sweet melon scent with subtle minty undertones adding spa-like freshness. Light and summery profile balancing natural fruit sweetness without heaviness.

items.label: Pear Pomegranate
items.description: Juicy pear as dominant note followed by sparkling pomegranate in supporting role. Fresh and fruity with subtle, clean quality that improves during curing.

items.label: Sweet Grape
items.description: Dominant grape note with strong, sweet character reminiscent of grape lollipops. Fruity, juicy profile evoking fresh grapes and grape juice with playful, nostalgic quality.

items.label: Papaya
items.description: Dominant papaya note with sweet, powdered sugar base note creating fresh and tropical character. Intensely fruity and playfully sugary, reminiscent of tropical candy.

items.label: Blackberry Amber
items.description: Fruity blackberry notes combined with warm amber base balancing woody and fruity elements. Smooth, sensual, dramatic, warm, and feminine character.

items.label: Balsamic Greens & Grapefruit
items.description: Grapefruit dominant note tempered by warm florals and woodsy, green scents. Crisp, clean, and refreshing with sophisticated, non-cloying character balancing tart citrus with herbal and earthy undertones.

items.label: Adriatic Fig
items.description: Deep, exotic fig with fresh top notes of bergamot and touches of fruit, supported by musk, woods, and fruity base notes. Clean, earthy, and slightly sweet with mild aromatic profile.

items.label: Cranberry Currant
items.description: Tart, juicy fruit profile combining fresh cranberries with red currants. Bright, fruity character without overpowering sweetness, maintaining pleasant tartness.

items.label: Grapefruit Rhubarb
items.description: Zesty grapefruit as dominant citrus note with sweet rhubarb as supporting element. Clean, vibrant, crisp composition that is both bright and subtly sweet.

items.label: Peach Hibiscus PF
items.description: Juicy peach dominant note complemented by fresh-blooming hibiscus floral creating sweet, syrupy, golden character. Balances fruity and floral elements with both sweetness and light, fresh quality.

items.label: Basil & Nectarine
items.description: Dominant nectarine note with basil in supporting role creating sweet, fresh floral character. Nectarine prominence comes through clearly while herbal basil remains subtle and balanced.

items.label: Wildberry
items.description: Combination of sour cherries, fresh blueberries, and ripened raspberries as primary fruity composition. Sweet with mild, natural quality that doesn't overpower, delivering gentle berry profile.

items.label: Rosemary Melon (all natural)
items.description: Sweet fruit dominant note complemented by herbal rosemary with supporting hints of citrus, berry, orange, pine, and soft vanilla base. Sweet, fruity, herbal character with warm finish.

items.label: Narcissist
items.description: Fruity and floral top notes of juicy peach and citrus, moving into heart of magnolia, red raspberry, and jasmine, with warm musk and patchouli base. Sophisticated and alluring fruity-floral character.

items.label: Cozy Cottage
items.description: Fruity apple and spice notes as dominant character with supporting notes of eucalyptus, clove, and vanilla creating depth. Warm, seasonally oriented profile evoking cozy, holiday atmosphere with apple cider and cinnamon undertones.

items.label: Pear Glace
items.description: Sweet fruity pear and apple as dominant notes creating youthful and playful character. Described as delicious and fun, leaning fresh and fruity rather than heavy or woody.

items.label: White Nectarine
items.description: Soft fruity character with subtle citrus hint and slight floral undertone. Soft and clean with subtle fresh quality, presenting as light, delicate fruity fragrance that is not overpowering.

items.label: Yuzu
items.description: Dominant fresh citrus note with juicy sweet character. Delicate, fresh, and clean profile with citrus undertones.

items.label: Sunny Strawberry & Guava
items.description: Strawberry and guava as dominant fruity notes balanced with sugary vanilla undertones. Sweet, tropical profile with feminine character delivering authentic fruity scent rather than artificial candy-like sweetness.

items.label: Lavender Vanilla (all natural)
items.description: Lavender flower and clary sage leading to heliotrope and rosemary in middle, finishing with vanilla and warm cedarwood base. Comforting and warm character blending herbal floral and woody-vanilla notes.

items.label: Hello Sugar
items.description: The fragrance features a sugared citrus profile reminiscent of fruit snacks, with prominent sweet citrus notes balanced by subtle vanilla undertones. The overall character is bright, fruity, and distinctly sweet, designed to add confectionery warmth to fragrance blends.

items.label: Sparkling Berry Punch
items.description: This fragrance features a bright berry composition with an effervescent top note that creates a sparkling quality. The scent profile evokes a crisp, fruity punch with predominantly sweet berry notes reminiscent of Hawaiian Punch-style fruit beverages. The overall character is fresh, fruity, and refreshingly sweet with a fizzy, effervescent quality.

items.label: Japanese Citron
items.description: This fragrance combines bursts of citrus and florals as its primary elements, creating a fresh composition. The citrus component carries notes resembling yellow grapefruit with subtle herbal undertones that are almost sage-like. The overall character is clean and tangy with delicate floral qualities.

items.label: Volcano
items.description: This fragrance features citrus and tropical fruit as dominant top notes, with sugared oranges and lemons in the middle, finishing with earthy musk and vanilla base notes. Overall, it presents as a fresh and uplifting tropical citrus scent with subtle sweetness and earthiness.

items.label: Kumquat
items.description: Kumquat Fragrance Oil features a dominant sweet and tangy citrus note that creates an uplifting, fresh aroma. The scent profile balances fruity sweetness with bright citrus character, delivering a clean yet playful olfactory experience. Overall, it presents as fresh, sweet, and invigorating.

items.label: Lemon Lime
items.description: The fragrance features a dominant citrus blend of lemon and lime notes. According to the product description, it delivers an uplifting and fresh citrus scent without woody or floral undertones—essentially a clean, bright composition reminiscent of lemon-lime soda. The overall character is refreshing and zesty, presenting as a straightforward citrus fragrance.

items.label: Huckleberry
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant wild berry note with heavy, fruity characteristics that are slightly powdery and sugary sweet. The scent has a rich, syrupy quality with fruity depth and a sweet, powdery undertone that creates an overall character that is both fruity and delicately sweet.

items.label: Limelight
items.description: Lime is the dominant note in this fragrance oil, presenting as tart and fresh with a light sweetness. The scent has a crisp opening that softens slightly in the finish, creating a balanced, citrusy profile suitable for unisex applications.

items.label: Madagascar Orange
items.description: This fragrance features mandarin orange as the dominant note, complemented by cool, earthy tones of a wild island in the base. The overall character is earthy and subdued rather than sharp or overpowering, with the citrus element playing a supporting rather than assertive role.

items.label: Pineapple Vanilla CDL
items.description: This fragrance features sweet, juicy pineapple as the dominant note with a creamy vanilla undertone, creating a warm and sweet overall character that evokes exotic destinations.

items.label: Blackberry Boogie
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant berry note combined with amber as its base, creating a super sweet, delicious berry and amber blend. The overall character is decidedly sweet and approachable, making it marketed as suitable for younger audiences.

items.label: Red Currant
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant note of currant berries with a strong, fruity character. The scent is described as unique, and perfect for the fall or holiday season, offering a bold berry profile suitable for seasonal applications. Overall, it presents a vibrant, fruit-forward composition with autumn appeal.

items.label: Wild Strawberry
items.description: This fragrance oil is dominated by strawberry notes combined with raspberries and candied cherries, creating a fruity composition. The base features sugar crystals and vanilla cream, adding sweetness and creaminess to the blend. Overall, the scent profile is sweet, fruity, and dessert-like in character.

items.label: Pineapple Paradise
items.description: The dominant pineapple and coconut notes create a fresh, fruity top layer, with guava and sugar cane providing sweetness in the middle, while peach and amber wood ground the composition in warmth. This fragrance combines tropical fruit brightness with woody-amber depth, delivering an exotic and fresh overall character.

items.label: Lychee Sugared Mango
items.description: This fragrance features invigorating and crisp citrus top notes that define the scent, with lychee and mango as supporting fruit components. The overall character is fresh and fruity with a sugared sweetness.

items.label: Black Cherry Merlot
items.description: This fragrance leads with fruity wild berry and strawberry notes, transitions through a rose middle note, and finishes with a sugary vanilla base. The overall character is described as dark & luscious with a sophisticated, wine-like quality centered on cherry.

items.label: Paradise Fantasy
items.description: Paradise Fantasy is a fruity, tropical fragrance with dominant notes of coconut and mango, grounded by a driftwood base. The scent profile creates a sweet, fruity character with tropical warmth and depth.

items.label: South Seas
items.description: This fragrance features a fresh, nautical profile dominated by orange zest and crisp sea mist. Supporting notes include patchouli, bergamot, tobacco, leather, and a spearmint base, creating an overall character that is crisp, salty, and naturally-scented rather than aquatic or cosmetic in nature.

items.label: Jamaica Me Crazy
items.description: This fragrance opens with coconut, followed by orange, pineapple, and banana in the middle, with a sugary rum base that provides warmth. The overall character is tropical and sweet, evoking a beachy cocktail experience. It combines fruity and vanilla-rum elements for a playful, warm profile.

items.label: Citron & Oak
items.description: This fragrance features bright citrus as the dominant note, with Ponderosa Lemon, Bitter Orange, Citron Zest leading into floral middle notes of neroli and bergamot. The composition settles into an earthy, woody base combining vetiver and sundrenched woods, creating an overall character that is both refreshing and grounded.

items.label: Blueberry Surprise
items.description: Blueberry Surprise features ripe blueberries as the dominant note, complemented by buttercream frosting and vanilla sugar in the base. The fragrance combines juicy fruit with creamy, sweet elements creating an indulgent overall character.

items.label: Black Plum Tea
items.description: This fragrance leads with mixed fruits at the top, followed by jasmine and tea in the middle, with white musk as the base. The overall character is fruity and sweet, combining plum and berry notes with a subtle tea undertone that creates a balanced, approachable composition.

items.label: Santal And Coconut
items.description: This fragrance opens with fruity top notes of cherry and peach before transitioning to a floral-woody heart featuring rosewood and coconut. The composition settles into a warm, creamy base dominated by sandalwood with amber and vanilla, creating an overall character that is comforting and sophisticated.

items.label: Blueberry Thyme
items.description: This fragrance opens with a citrusy burst, transitions through berry and floral notes in the middle, and settles into a woody base. The scent is described as fruity, but in a fresh, sophisticated way with a balanced, complex character rather than a simple food-like fragrance.

items.label: Rosemary Lemon
items.description: The dominant note is lemon, paired with savory rosemary as a supporting note, creating a fresh and herbaceous character. The fragrance combines citrus brightness with herbal earthiness for a clean, aromatic profile. This blend offers a balanced combination of zesty and culinary-like qualities.

items.label: Fresh Citrus Collection
items.description: Six distinct citrus fragrance oils with bright lemon-lime, zesty citrus with pine, grapefruit with greens, warm orange spice, sweet lemon sugar, and vibrant citron-mandarin blends. The scents range from sharp and invigorating to warm and spiced, unified by their energizing citrus character.

items.label: Dragonfruit
items.description: Bright citrus opens to a blend of tropical fruits including pineapple, grapefruit, melon, lime, cherry, peach, and strawberry, grounded by white floral base notes. The overall character is fresh, sweet, and tropical.

items.label: Orange Spice Tea
items.description: Orange is the dominant note, complemented by nutmeg and pepper in the middle, with black tea forming the base. The overall character is spicy and sweet, resembling a brewed cup of orange spice tea.

items.label: Hawaiian Ruby Guava
items.description: Tropical fruit notes with deep raspberry and pineapple as the dominant scent, complemented by rose in the middle, and cedarwood with patchouli in the base. The overall character is tropical and fruity with warm, woody undertones.

items.label: Turkish Pomelo
items.description: Zesty citrus with lemon peel and grapefruit leading the composition, plum sweetness in the middle notes, and red rose in the base. The overall character is fresh yet floral-tinged with fruity warmth.

items.label: Over The Rainbow
items.description: Fruity melon notes dominated by sun-sweet watermelon with ripe cantaloupe and watery honeydew, brightened with sea salt and ozone-infused green notes. The overall character is fresh and aquatic-fruity with a slightly salty-mineral edge.

items.label: Figuier (our version of Diptyque)
items.description: Green fig leaves are the dominant note, complemented by fig and coconut in the middle, with woody notes and cedar in the base. The overall character is lush and Mediterranean, evoking a sun-warmed fig tree with creamy and woody undertones.

items.label: Suede (our version of Byredo)
items.description: Crisp bergamot and aldehydes open before transitioning to lily-of-the-valley and violet in the heart, with plum, amber, and musk in the base. The overall character is refined and chic with a smooth dry-down.

items.label: Grapefruit (our version of NEST)
items.description: Grapefruit with mandarin is the dominant note, supported by lily of the valley in the middle, and grounded by coriander blossom and musk at the base. The overall character is bright and uplifting citrus.

items.label: Midnight Blue Citrus (our version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Vibrant citrus is the dominant note, complemented by tropical fruits in the middle and ocean breeze with amber in the base. The overall character is crisp and clean with a touch of warmth.

items.label: Goji Tarocco Orange (our version of Voluspa)
items.description: Goji berry and tarocco orange open the composition, transitioning through mango, and settling into a base of sugarcane and vanilla. The overall profile is juicy and vibrant with a zesty character.

items.label: Panjore Lychee (our version of Voluspa)
items.description: Juicy lychee and pear notes create a bright opening, the heart features cassis, while the base combines soft sugar and rose for floral sweetness. Overall, the scent is fruity, tart, and luminous.

items.label: Santiago Huckleberry (our version of Voluspa)
items.description: Tart huckleberry is the dominant note, with sugarcane in the middle and vanilla with sweet musk as the base. Overall, it delivers a rich, jammy, and slightly floral gourmand blend.

items.label: Hawaii (our version of Homesick Candles)
items.description: Coconut and pineapple are the dominant top notes, with plumeria and ocean air in the middle, grounded by sugarcane and vanilla base notes. The overall character is tropical and warm, evoking a seaside escape with sweet, fruity elements balanced by vanilla.

items.label: Dark Rum (Our Version of MALIN+GOETZ)
items.description: Dark rum is the dominant note, layered with leather, milk accord, and subtle spice, supported by amber, patchouli, and vanilla in the base. The overall character is a rich yet modern boozy gourmand with warm and intoxicating qualities.

items.label: Grapefruit (Our Version of MALIN+GOETZ)
items.description: Bright pink grapefruit and bergamot are the primary notes, complemented by rosemary and mint in the middle, with musk and amber providing a clean base. The overall character is crisp and energizing with a citrus-forward profile softened by herbal and musky undertones.

items.label: Cedar Leather
items.description: Dominant woody cedar note combined with amber musk and tonka bean in the base create a classic masculine scent. The overall character is warm, comforting, and sophisticated with earthy undertones.

items.label: Sandalwood and Amber
items.description: Sandalwood is the dominant note, complemented by amber in the base. The combination creates a fresh and spicy fragrance with warm and woody characteristics overall.

items.label: Tobacco Vanilla
items.description: Vanilla is dominant with a subtle tobacco undertone that provides sophistication without being overpowering. The overall character is smooth and sweet with warmth, creating a balanced composition suitable for colognes and perfumes.

items.label: Frankincense and Myrrh
items.description: Frankincense forms the base note with supporting notes of fresh pine, dry sage, and patchouli. The overall character has a musky, earthy quality with warm and rich tones suitable for winter wear.

items.label: Sandalwood Vanilla
items.description: Warm vanilla is the dominant note with earthy sandalwood musk in the base, creating soft, warm, and lush vanilla with an earthy, woody undertone. The overall character is relaxing and elegant rather than overpowering.

items.label: Sandalwood Bourbon HRC
items.description: Woody sandalwood notes are dominant with spicy undertones and a subtle amber moss base. The overall character is warm and sophisticated, designed with a masculine profile that delivers refined, earthy composition with gentle sweetness.

items.label: Warm Rustic Woods
items.description: Soft and sweet pear, lily of the valley, and rose form the top and heart notes, with warm amber and vanilla as the base. The overall character is a balanced blend that leans both sweet and woody, described as clean and somewhat masculine.

items.label: Amber (all natural)
items.description: Amber is the dominant note, blended with vanilla, musk, and wood accords. The overall character is warm and alluring with a subtle presentation and an aftershave-like quality.

items.label: Cuban Tobacco
items.description: Amber is the dominant note, providing prominent sweetness complemented by supporting notes of spices, cherry, and clove. The overall character is described as the ultimate masculine mix with a warm, spiced quality resembling pipe tobacco.

items.label: Arabian White Musk
items.description: Soft musk as the dominant note with a sandalwood base, creating a fresh, warm, and woodsy composition. The scent profile is understated rather than overpowering, with notable strength and projection.

items.label: Mountain Rain
items.description: Fresh, clean rain as the dominant characteristic with mossy wood and lavender-rose middle notes. The overall profile is crisp and airy with subtle sweetness and earthy undertones.

items.label: Sandalwood 2
items.description: Classic, rich, warm scent of sandalwood as the primary characteristic, emphasizing authentic wood notes without powdery undertones. A deep and woody composition that is genuine, warm, and grounding.

items.label: Cucumber Mint
items.description: Cool mint as the dominant note complemented by fresh cucumber undertones, creating a clean and crisp overall character. The scent is soft and fresh, delivering a light, refreshing quality.

items.label: Teakwood
items.description: Intense aromas of amber and wood as the dominant notes, complemented by bergamot, cardamom, jasmine, and lily of the valley. The overall character is warm, floral, and masculine with a clean, woodsy profile.

items.label: Musk
items.description: Dominant musk note with a warm, sophisticated, and smooth character. The scent profile is deep and dreamy, works well in blends, with a lighter intensity spectrum. An understated, elegant fragrance.

items.label: Cool Citrus Herb (all natural)
items.description: Bright citrus notes as the dominant element with bergamot and herbal tea undertone creating a tart, fresh character. Orange and tangerine as the primary note with subtle grassy herb elements, delivering a clean and refreshing impression.

items.label: Cherry Tobacco
items.description: Warm, pleasant, and sweet character with prominent tobacco notes. The scent combines cherry and tobacco elements into a balanced, warm profile suitable for multiple product applications.

items.label: Rosemary Mint
items.description: Warm, fresh rosemary with cool, light mint, balanced between herbal and cooling components. The scent creates an invigorating and clean profile that avoids a medicinal character.

items.label: Bug Gone (all natural)
items.description: Natural citronella and peppermint as the dominant notes, supported by lemongrass, cedarwood, and geranium. The overall character is fresh and herbaceous with a medicinal quality designed to repel insects.

items.label: Nag Champa
items.description: Top notes of black currant, mandarin, and black pepper with a dominant powdery and floral character. The middle and base include orange blossom, musk, patchouli, vanilla, and sandalwood, creating a warm, powdery floral with spiced and woody depth.

items.label: Bug Be Gone
items.description: Herbal blend dominated by citronella and lemongrass, with supporting notes of orange, eucalyptus, and litsea cubeba. The overall character is fresh and herbaceous, designed to repel insects while maintaining a pleasant aromatic profile.

items.label: Cool Citrus Basil (version of Bath & Body Works)
items.description: Bright citrus as the dominant note, complemented by herbal basil and a lemonade-like freshness. The overall character is refreshing and summery, creating an energizing and clean scent profile.

items.label: Frankincense and Rain
items.description: Prominent incense and spice notes, particularly cinnamon and clove, with subtle citrus and herbal elements. The base combines vanilla and cedarwood for warmth and depth. Intoxicating and calming with a masculine character.

items.label: Tobacco & Rum PF
items.description: Sweet tropical bay rum as the dominant note, complemented by a soft hint of tobacco in the base. The overall character is aromatic and sophisticated with warm, soapy qualities.

items.label: Ocean
items.description: Salty sea air as the dominant note, complemented by jasmine and bergamot in the middle, with musk, woods, and patchouli in the base. The overall character is fresh and aquatic, evoking a clean, spa-like quality.

items.label: Oakmoss
items.description: Dominant warm, woody oakmoss note with sweet and earthy supporting tones, along with fresh, clean undertones. The overall character is earthy and green, evoking a lush forest atmosphere.

items.label: Sunset Over Sydney
items.description: Delicate musk as the dominant note, complemented by orange and eucalyptus supporting notes. The overall character is described as clean and fresh with a pleasant musky quality.

items.label: Wood Shop
items.description: Aroma of freshly cut wood with a coniferous, pine-like character emphasizing natural wood and sawdust notes. A realistic woodshop atmosphere without added sweetness or artificial cleaning product qualities. Earthy, woody, and authentic.

items.label: Windsong Balsam Pine (not skin safe)
items.description: Crisp pine and fir notes as the dominant element, with supporting balsam and musk undertones creating a wintery, spruce-like character. A fresh, woodsy profile with a cool, resinous aroma typical of coniferous forests.

items.label: Exotic Grapefruit Sea Salt
items.description: Citrus as the dominant character, with notes of lime, grapefruit, and peppermint creating a layered profile. The scent combines tropical and herbaceous elements with fresh, minty undertones for an overall clean and energizing character.

items.label: Northern Woods
items.description: Woody and earthy base notes dominate with bright citrus accents. A refreshing and masculine character that starts with zesty top notes and develops into a complex, lingering scent with an unexpectedly sweet quality.

items.label: Black Oak Currant
items.description: Dark black currants as the dominant note combined with woody oak in the base, creating a mysterious and romantic scent profile. Piney and resinous with fruity undertones, presenting a complex and somewhat masculine character.

items.label: Cedar Closet
items.description: Rich cedar note as the lead, evoking the woody aroma of traditional cedar chests and closets. Supporting notes include earthy, forest-like qualities reminiscent of cedar wood and natural wood elements. Clean, woodsy, and grounded.

items.label: Mountain Meets The Ocean
items.description: Top notes of bergamot, cyclamen, melon, and peach blossom combined with floral middle notes including rose, jasmine, white lily, gardenia, and violet. The composition settles into a woody, musky base, creating an overall fresh and floral character with subtle fruity brightness.

items.label: Redwood Embers
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant spicy cinnamon and clove blend. It has a floral bouquet in the middle with woody undertones providing base character. Overall, the scent profile is warm and woody with prominent spice notes.

items.label: Agave Musk
items.description: The scent is dominated by rose, which emerges as the primary note and provides the fragrance's main character. Peach and agave offer fruity and herbal supporting notes, while musk provides a warm base that adds depth and longevity. Overall, it presents as a sweet, soft floral composition with subtle fruity undertones.

items.label: Aspen Grass
items.description: Aspen Grass is dominated by a freshly mown grass note enriched with floral elements including orange blossom, white lily, and jasmine, plus hints of strawberry. The overall character is fresh and elegant, with a clean spring quality that balances earthy undertones with subtle sweetness.

items.label: Canyon Falls PF
items.description: This woodsy fragrance leads with basil, pine, and lime in the top notes, followed by patchouli and earthy sandalwood in the base. The overall character is natural and sophisticated, with a fresh-green quality combined with earthy warmth.

items.label: Cocoa Butter Cashmere
items.description: The scent is dominated by cocoa butter with sweet and vanilla notes, complemented by floral and coconut in the middle, and amber musk with light spices in the base. It delivers a warm, luxurious, and creamy character with traces of banana adding softness throughout.

items.label: Herbal Essence
items.description: This fragrance opens with vibrant green apple as the dominant note, complemented by lily and rose in the middle and base. The overall character is fresh and herbaceous with a clean, crisp quality.

items.label: Ginger & Lime
items.description: Lime is the dominant note in this fragrance, with spicy ginger providing supporting character, creating a fresh and zest-forward scent profile overall.

items.label: Soothing Aloe and Green Tea
items.description: The aloe is the dominant note, described as semi sweet soothing, while fresh herbal green tea serves as the base. Overall, this is a cool and soothing fragrance with a fresh character.

items.label: Ginger Crushed Rosemary Fig
items.description: This fragrance features a prominent ginger top note that transitions into earthy rosemary, finishing with warm fig undertones. The blend combines sparkling citrus-spice elements with herbal and fruity characteristics, creating a scent that is both fresh and warm with balanced sweetness and spice.

items.label: Sage & Cedarwood
items.description: The fragrance opens with bergamot and grapefruit brightness, then moves through clary sage, rosemary, and coriander seed in the middle. Juniper berries, rosewood, and guaiacwood create a warm, textured base with an overall fresh and herbaceous woody character.

items.label: Scotch Pine Cranberry
items.description: The scent features pine as its dominant note, with cranberry and pear as supporting elements, grounded in a warm amber base. This combination creates a fresh yet warm profile with a crisp, fruity character. Overall, it presents as a balanced blend that is both invigorating and comforting.

items.label: Ginger Amber
items.description: This fragrance features warm amber as the dominant note, complemented by spicy ginger accents. The overall character is described as balancing sweetness with spice, creating a warm and slightly musky profile suitable for multiple applications including candles and soaps.

items.label: White Sand Beaches
items.description: The dominant note is warm with soft floral undertones, complemented by earthy patchouli in the base. Overall, this fragrance presents as a delicate, calming composition that reads fresh and unisex.

items.label: Homestead
items.description: This fragrance features a dominant pumpkin note combined with creamy coconut milk, nutmeg, and additional spices. The overall character is warm and cozy with autumn-inspired spice undertones that reviewers describe as comforting and reminiscent of home.

items.label: Zen Collection
items.description: This collection contains six distinct scents featuring earth-toned notes. The fragrances emphasize natural elements like florals (rose, jasmine, gardenia), citrus (lemon, orange, mandarin), and woody/herbal base notes (sandalwood, patchouli, lavender). Overall, the scents evoke fresh, calming, and organic characteristics ranging from garden-fresh to oceanic.

items.label: Sandalwood Bourbon CDL
items.description: This fragrance features sandalwood as its dominant note, complemented by amber, moss, and spice elements. The composition creates a woody character with amber undertones. Overall, it presents as a warm, woody fragrance with subtle spiced notes suitable for men's candle applications.

items.label: Aromatherapy Collection
items.description: This collection contains six fragrance oils with varied scent profiles. The dominant notes range from lavender and eucalyptus to citrus and mint, supported by floral accords, vanilla, and herbal bases. Overall, the collection emphasizes fresh, spa-like aromatherapy scents with cooling and rejuvenating character.

items.label: Coffee
items.description: The fragrance leads with freshly-ground coffee blended with roasted tonka and pralines. Supporting notes include almond milk and vanilla, while cocoa and maple form the warm, sweet base. Overall character is gourmand and comforting with a roasted, dessert-like quality.

items.label: Teakwood
items.description: This fragrance opens with lime, lemon, and ozone breeze, transitions through lavender and fruity-green notes in the middle, and settles into a base of sandalwood and amber. The overall character is fresh and zesty at the top, becoming warm and woody in the finish.

items.label: Birchwood Oud
items.description: Birchwood Oud opens with bright citrus and herbal top notes before moving to a leather and cypress heart, finishing with a deep base of oud, frankincense, and amber. The overall character is mysterious and woody with earthy complexity. It presents as a sophisticated, masculine-leaning fragrance with balanced depth.

items.label: Spice Shop Collection
items.description: This collection contains six fragrance oils with varied dominant notes. The scents feature spice-forward profiles including cinnamon, ginger, and patchouli, complemented by woody, amber, and citrus supporting notes. Overall character ranges from warm and cozy to complex and addictive.

items.label: Hickory And Suede
items.description: Hickory And Suede features a dominant vanilla and suede accord enriched with woody hickory notes throughout. The fragrance maintains a creamy, sweet character with woody undertones that create a simultaneously smooth and robust profile. Overall, it presents as a warm, slightly masculine blend balancing sweet vanilla with masculine woody elements.

items.label: Black Suede & Saffron
items.description: Black Suede & Saffron Fragrance Oil features suede as its dominant note, complemented by saffron spice in the top notes and incense smoke with vintage leather in the base. The overall character is luxurious and warm, with a sophisticated blend of floral and amber undertones.

items.label: Winter Forest
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by pine and citrus notes (orange and lemon), with a floral heart of jasmine and sandalwood that adds complexity. The base provides cedarwood and mossy undertones, creating an overall woody, fresh, and slightly fruity character.

items.label: Highland Lodge
items.description: Highland Lodge opens with fresh fir needle notes, followed by warm mixed spice in the middle, and grounds itself in a cedarwood base. The scent delivers a woodsy, outdoorsy character with spicy undertones of clove and cinnamon. Overall, it presents as a fresh yet warm forest fragrance suitable for masculine applications.

items.label: Frosted Juniper
items.description: Juniper and pine are the dominant top and middle notes, with cedarwood, amber, and musk providing a warm base. The scent combines crisp, fresh herbaceous qualities with cozy, woody undertones. Overall, it delivers a balanced character that is both invigorating and comforting.

items.label: Tobacco And Bay Leaf
items.description: This fragrance leads with citrus and fruit notes (lime, bergamot, apple), then transitions through herbaceous middle notes featuring bay leaf, tobacco, and sage. The composition concludes with warm base notes of cedarwood, musk, and amber, creating an overall sophisticated and woody character.

items.label: Oud Wood
items.description: This fragrance opens with cardamom and rosewood, transitions through a heart of rich oud and sandalwood, and finishes with a warm, creamy base of amber, tonka bean, and vanilla. The overall character is warm and woody with spiced undertones.

items.label: Angels' Share
items.description: This fragrance opens with a cognac top note, followed by middle notes of cinnamon, tonka bean, and oak wood, with a base of praline, vanilla, and sandalwood. It's characterized as a warm gourmand with a decadent, spiced-sweet profile.

items.label: Ultra Shea Butter
items.description: The fragrance opens with apricot nectar and green apple, transitions through plum blossom and white flowers, and settles into a creamy base of vanilla bean, coconut, and milky musk. It has a warm, fruity-floral character with creamy undertones.

items.label: Mahogany Teakwood
items.description: This fragrance is centered around masculine woods and rich mahogany with supporting notes of oak and lavender, finishing with a musk and cedarwood base. The overall character is bold and cologne-like, with a woody, aromatic profile.

items.label: Scarlet Cypress Wreath
items.description: This holiday scent leads with bright citrus notes, supported by fresh fir needle in the middle, and grounded by sugar and spice base notes. The overall character is fresh and festive with sparkling citrus and berry undertones, delivering a warm, spiced sweetness alongside evergreen freshness.

items.label: Earthy Elegance Collection
items.description: This curated set features woody and herbal dominant notes including cedarwood, oud, and fir, supported by base notes of musk, amber, and sandalwood. The overall character is sophisticated and grounded, evoking natural elegance with earthy, warm, and slightly spiced qualities.

items.label: Ginger And Spice
items.description: This fragrance oil features spicy orange as the opening note, transitioning to a heart of cinnamon and ginger, and finishing with vanilla and musk base notes. The overall character is warm and spiced, with a creamy vanilla-musk finish that grounds the brighter citrus and spice elements.

items.label: White Birch Leaves
items.description: White Birch Leaves features a fresh pine dominant note layered with citrus and berry elements, supported by a clove middle note and pine base. The overall character is crisp and herbaceous with subtle spice undertones.

items.label: Bamboo And Coconut
items.description: This fragrance leads with fresh marine breezes and green bamboo, followed by fruity coconut and apple notes in the middle. The base features vanilla, cedar, patchouli, and amber, creating an overall character that is fresh, fruity, and woody with sweet undertones.

items.label: 1 Million
items.description: This fragrance opens with citrus and mint notes, develops spiced florals in the middle, and settles into a warm base of amber, leather, and patchouli. The overall character is bold and magnetic with a seductive, spiced warmth.

items.label: Frasier Fir
items.description: This fragrance features Siberian Fir as the top note, with cedarwood in the middle and sandalwood/musk as the base. The overall character is a crisp, woody evergreen scent with fresh forest-like qualities and warm undertones.

items.label: Christmas Splendor
items.description: The dominant notes are spiced orange and holiday spices including cinnamon and clove, supported by cheerful berries and a warm vanilla base. The overall character is festive and warming, with a strong spicy-citrus profile that reads as traditional holiday scent.

items.label: Christmas Wish
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by oranges and fresh woody pines with creamy vanilla as a supporting base note, creating a warm and sweet holiday scent that reviewers consistently describe as reminiscent of Christmas cookies.

items.label: Peppermint Swirl
items.description: This fragrance features a strong peppermint as its dominant note, complemented by warm vanilla in the base. The overall character is described as sweet peppermint with a twist of warm vanilla, creating a balanced, dessert-like scent profile.

items.label: Creamy Nutmeg
items.description: This fragrance features powerful nutmeg as the dominant note, complemented by creamy butter undertones. The composition is grounded in a sugary vanilla base that creates an overall warm, sweet, and comforting character.

items.label: Dickens Christmas
items.description: This fragrance features mulled fruits and spices as dominant notes, with subtle vanilla undertones, creating a warm and comforting profile reminiscent of Victorian-era holiday traditions. The scent combines cinnamon, citrus, and cranberry elements that evoke the feeling of a festive Christmas celebration.

items.label: Merry Mistletoe
items.description: This fragrance oil features fir needle and pine as dominant notes, complemented by red berry and clove with a woody base. The overall character is fresh and spiced, evoking a festive holiday atmosphere with natural forest undertones.

items.label: Sleigh Ride
items.description: This fragrance features a fresh, minty profile with fir needles, wintergreen, eucalyptus, and winter spices as its primary components. The scent delivers a bright, cool character with herbal and spiced undertones that evoke a crisp winter atmosphere.

items.label: Holly Balsam 2
items.description: Holly Balsam 2 opens with fresh pine and crisp apples, followed by sweet and spicy clove in the middle notes, and closes with a warm amber base. The overall scent profile evokes a festive, holiday character with fruity and spiced warmth.

items.label: Reindeer Retreat
items.description: The dominant note is pine, which opens fresh and woody. Supporting notes include fir needles, lilies of the valley, and jasmine, adding floral and green dimensions. The overall character is a northern pine woodland scent with a holiday, festive quality.

items.label: White Christmas
items.description: This fragrance combines floral notes of jasmine, violet, and rose with fir and fruit accents, finishing on a woody base. The overall character is floral and somewhat sweet with subtle evergreen undertones, presenting as a balanced, delicate holiday-themed scent.

items.label: Xmas Memory
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by cinnamon as the primary note, complemented by sweet orange in the top notes and a creamy vanilla and clove base. The overall character is warm and spiced, evoking festive holiday gatherings with a smoky, exotic quality.

items.label: Holiday Crunch
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by cinnamon and spice notes with supporting citrus (orange) and floral (lily of the valley) elements, finishing with a warm amber and vanilla base. The overall character is warm, spicy, and festive with a slightly sweet undertone reminiscent of holiday baked goods.

items.label: Premium Christmas Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: This collection features six distinct holiday fragrances with varying profiles.
