Dominant notes range across mulled fruits and spices, oranges and fresh woody pines, to fir needle and eucalyptus, depending on the individual scent. Supporting notes include vanilla, clove, rose, and wintergreen, while base notes are consistently woody or provide grounding warmth.

items.label: Holiday Fragrance Oil (NEST version)
items.description: This fragrance features fresh, crisp orange as the dominant note, complemented by clove and warm vanilla in the base. The overall character is fresh and warm, capturing a classic holiday aroma with spiced undertones.

items.label: Blue Christmas Fragrance Oil
items.description: The fragrance features bergamot and pine as top notes, with spice in the middle and vanilla musk as the base. The overall profile blends crisp, herbal qualities with warm, musky undertones, creating a cologne-like scent.

items.label: Winter Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: This collection includes Holly Balsam with winter pine, sweet apples and clove, Cranberry Cobbler, Apple Cinnamon, Christmas Splendor with nutmeg and holiday rosemary, Peppermint Swirl, and Snowy Evergreen. The collection emphasizes warm, spiced, and woody character typical of holiday season fragrances.

items.label: Holiday Spice Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: This collection features warm spice notes as the dominant accords, with cinnamon, clove, and orange leading across the various scents. Supporting notes include cranberry, chestnuts, brown sugar, and mistletoe elements that add sweetness and depth.

items.label: Acqua Di Gio Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features crushed mint leaves as the dominant note, complemented by warm brown sugar and lemon zest in the base. The overall character is clean and masculine.

items.label: Le Male Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance oil features a strong, warm, masculine, and slightly woody scent. The dominant characteristic is its warmth and masculine quality, with woody undertones providing depth.

items.label: Burberry for Men Fragrance Oil
items.description: This citrusy and woodsy fragrance features lime as a dominant note with rose providing support, creating a masculine overall character. The scent profile emphasizes sophistication with a fresh, herbal quality.

items.label: Old Time Barbershop Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by powdery bay rum with sandalwood and earthy patchouli notes, creating a nostalgic barbershop atmosphere. The overall character is warm, vintage, and masculine, reminiscent of classic shaving creams.

items.label: Polo Red Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features spicy and warm amber as its dominant character, complemented by red grapefruit and woody notes. The composition creates a warm, masculine scent with an overall spicy, woodsy profile.

items.label: Eternity Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features a white floral blend as its dominant characteristic, supported by base notes of patchouli, sandalwood, and amber that provide warmth and depth. The overall scent profile is light and floral but not too sweet, creating a balanced, elegant composition.

items.label: Pure Sport Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features an earthy, masculine base with citrus highlights. The overall character is described as masculine and earthy with hints of citrus, delivering a mild to light scent intensity.

items.label: Guess for Men Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with bergamot as the dominant fresh note, followed by spicy nutmeg and cedarleaf base notes. Overall, it delivers a clean, sophisticated, and mildly spicy aromatic profile with fresh characteristics.

items.label: Dark Temptation Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features smooth chocolate as the dominant note, complemented by orange and white musk in the base. The overall character is clean and musky with a masculine profile.

items.label: Sophisticated Man Fragrance Oil Collection
items.description: This collection contains six distinct fragrances with varying dominant notes. The scents feature woody and spice-forward profiles, including cedar and sandalwood as key components, complemented by vanilla, amber, and musky base notes.

items.label: Sauvage Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance oil features zesty bergamot as the dominant top note, with a spiced middle layer of black pepper, lavender, star anise, and nutmeg, finishing in a warm woody and amber base. The overall character is captivating and refreshing, balancing bright citrus with grounding warm notes.

items.label: Obsession Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance is dominated by spice and bergamot notes with amber woods as the base, creating a warm and woody composition. The scent profile balances citrus brightness with deeper, earthy undertones, delivering a sophisticated, masculine fragrance character.

items.label: Break Line Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance offers a fresh, aquatic-woody composition characteristic of masculine scents. The profile emphasizes clean, water-like notes layered with woody undertones that create an overall fresh and masculine character.

items.label: Smoked Oud Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features oud as its dominant note, complemented by hints of frankincense resin, amber, and smoky musk. The overall character is described as relaxing and incense-like, with a smoky, herbal quality that evokes patchouli and bonfire elements.

items.label: Aventus Fragrance Oil
items.description: This masculine fragrance is built on birch and black currant as dominant notes, with pineapple and patchouli in the middle, settling into a base of musk, oak moss, and cedarwood. The overall character is dynamic and sophisticated with a zesty, robust quality.

items.label: Bourbon Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features clean, shower-fresh notes with bourbon as the dominant middle note, grounded by woody, powdery, and musky base notes. The overall character is masculine and smooth, blending fresh cleanliness with subtle sweetness and warmth.

items.label: Eros Fragrance Oil
items.description: The fragrance opens with Italian lemon and mandarin, mint oil, candied apple creating a bright, fresh top note. The heart develops into floral and herbal qualities through geranium and clary sage, while the base anchors with cedarwood, vetiver, patchouli, and sandalwood.

items.label: Arctic Edge Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance features bursting notes of pine, apple, and spice as dominant elements within a clean citrus profile, rounded out with patchouli and musky base notes. The overall character is fresh and clean with a slightly spiced, woody undertone.

items.label: Whiskey Reserve Fragrance Oil
items.description: Whiskey Reserve opens with bright citrus notes (lime and mandarin) that introduce a whiskey accord, before settling into a woody, smoky, musky base with cedar, vetiver, and patchouli. The overall character is warm and masculine with smoky undertones.

items.label: Suede & Smoke Fragrance Oil
items.description: This fragrance opens with a smoky top note, transitions through a woody middle, and settles into a base of patchouli, amber, and musk. The overall character is warm and grounded, with an emphasis on earthy, smoky woods and soft animalic base notes.

items.label: Irish Spring
items.description: Fresh and clean profile with musk as the dominant note, supported by bergamot, citrus, and woody accords. The overall character is crisp and masculine-oriented.

items.label: Ocean
items.description: Fresh ocean breeze and pine opening, transitions through white florals and lavender, settling into woody and musky base notes. The overall character is clean and fresh with grounding depth.

items.label: Woodsman Collection
items.description: Collection of six oils with varying profiles: warm spices and caramelized apple, woody hickory and vanilla, citrus and whiskey, bergamot and lavender, zesty lime and lavender, and fresh pine with lemon. Overall earthy, woody, and rustic character.

items.label: Smoke & Allure Collection
items.description: Collection of six fragrances with smoky and woody dominant notes, particularly oud and mahogany, complemented by spice, citrus, and musk accords. Creates sophisticated and warm compositions with masculine character overall.

items.label: Timber Tar
items.description: Pine dominates the top note, complemented by smoky notes in the middle and citrus zest in the base. The overall character is rugged and woodsy with earthy undertones.

items.label: Whiskey Barrel
items.description: Bourbon dominates the top note, followed by charred oak in the middle and vanilla in the base, creating a warm and woody scent profile that evokes the character of a whiskey barrel.

items.label: Luxe Musks Collection
items.description: Collection kit of six distinct fragrances with dominant notes ranging from citrus and cedarwood to patchouli, leather, and sea salt. Features spices, amber, and vetiver creating sophisticated, masculine character profiles that are woody, earthy, and warm.

items.label: Gunsmoke
items.description: Smoked wood dominates, with bourbon vanilla in the middle creating a bridge to charred leather in the base. The overall character is rugged and woody with smoky, leathery undertones balanced by subtle sweetness.

items.label: Whitewater Rush
items.description: Fresh, aquatic opening with racing water character, supported by citrus notes of lemon peel and bergamot, finishing with a woody amber musk base. Creates a masculine, sophisticated blend.

items.label: Mountain Sage
items.description: Cypress dominates the top note, with lavender in the middle and sage in the base, creating a crisp and refreshing character that evokes a mountain atmosphere.

items.label: Glacier Falls
items.description: Fresh water dominates the top note, complemented by crisp air in the middle and a citrus base. The overall character is clean and invigorating, evoking the sensation of a cascading waterfall.

items.label: Outlaw Musk
items.description: Opens with peppercorn spice, develops into a center of earthy musk, and finishes with woody cedar notes. The overall character is bold and masculine with warm, spicy-woody undertones.

items.label: Oak Barrel
items.description: Opens with oak as the dominant note, complemented by bourbon in the middle and woodsy base notes. The overall character is warm and woody with subtle bourbon undertones.

items.label: Y
items.description: Opens with crisp bergamot and ginger notes, complemented by sage and geranium in the middle, and grounded by deep woods, tonka bean, and vetiver at the base. The overall character is a modern fougère with fresh, woody profile.

items.label: Leaf & Leather
items.description: Opens with tobacco leaf as the dominant note, followed by a leather middle note and earthy undertones in the base. The overall character is masculine and vintage-inspired with warm, woody qualities.

items.label: Le Beau
items.description: Coconut dominates the middle note, supported by tonka bean and amberwood in the base, with bergamot in the top. The overall character is tropical-woody with sweet and sensual qualities.

items.label: REPLICA Jazz Club
items.description: Features rum and tobacco as dominant middle and base notes, complemented by vanilla bean and warm spice undertones. The scent profile emphasizes smoky, intoxicating qualities with subtle citrus top notes and warm, tobacco-forward personality.

items.label: Crisp Aloe
items.description: Features aquatic notes in the top, with aloe vera as the heart note and green florals in the base, creating an overall fresh and soothing scent profile.

items.label: Le Labo Inspired Collection
items.description: Collection of six individual fragrance oils. Primary fragrance Santal 33 leads with smoky Australian sandalwood and cedarwood, supported by spicy cardamom, iris, and violet in the base, creating a warm, leathery, musky character with signature depth.

items.label: Homme
items.description: Features iris as the dominant middle note, complemented by citrus and floral top notes with leather and woody base accords. The overall character is refined and powdery with understated elegance.

items.label: Hinoki
items.description: Opens with hinoki cypress and incense, developing into cedarwood and olibanum in the middle, finishing with patchouli and musk at the base. The overall character is meditative and woodsy with smoky, earthy qualities.

items.label: Tom Ford Inspired Collection
items.description: Collection of six fragrances with varying profiles: spiced tobacco and creamy tonka (Tobacco Vanille), supple suede with raspberry and saffron (Tuscan Leather), juicy cherry with rose and jasmine (Lost Cherry), rich oud and sandalwood (Oud Wood), dark truffle and orchid (Black Orchid), and creamy coconut with white florals (Soleil Blanc). Character ranges from smoky-sweet to intoxicating floral to sun-soaked warmth.

items.label: Tobacco Vanille
items.description: Opens with spiced tobacco leaf, then transitions through vanilla, cacao, and tonka bean in the middle, finishing with dried fruits and woody notes at the base. The overall character is a luxurious, smoky-sweet aroma balancing bold spiced tobacco with creamy, warm vanilla.

items.label: Phlur Inspired Collection
items.description: Multi-fragrance collection of six oils featuring soft musks and florals (Missing Person), juicy strawberry with creamy base (Strawberry Letter), minimalist vanilla with tonka (Vanilla Skin), velvety peach with woods (Peach Skin), coconut musk with salty warmth (Beach Skin), and indulgent gourmand with cream and vanilla (Heavy Cream). Overall character ranges from intimate and subtle to playful and comforting.

items.label: Ombre Leather
items.description: Opens with cardamom, developing into a leather-forward heart softened by jasmine, and finishing with warm amber, moss, and patchouli in the base. The overall character is rich and textural with a balance of sweetness and earthiness.

items.label: Tuscan Leather Fragrance Oil (Our Version of Tom Ford)
items.description: Leather and suede are the dominant notes, layered with raspberry, saffron, and thyme, finishing with amber, woody notes, and oud. Bold and intense with rugged elegance and a smoky quality.

items.label: Warm Vanilla Sugar Fragrance Oil
items.description: Vanilla dominates with creamy coconut milk and rosewood top notes, followed by jasmine and caramelized sugar, with amber musk base. Warm and sweet with a smooth, balanced profile.

items.label: Creamy Coconut Fragrance Oil
items.description: Warm vanilla with tropical coconut notes create a creamy rather than fruity character with subtle, mellow quality. Warm, sweet, and reminiscent of piña colada or coconut cream.

items.label: Sun & Sand Fragrance Oil
items.description: Sunscreen and salty sea air are the primary notes, blending tropical and ozonic elements that recreate the beach. Fresh, crisp, and nostalgic with warm undertones.

items.label: Coconut Passion Fragrance Oil
items.description: Vanilla is the dominant note, complemented by sweet coconut and lily of the valley in the base. Sensual and warm with a slightly powdery character.

items.label: Hawaiian Tropic Fragrance Oil
items.description: Coconut note characteristic of suntan lotion dominates with sweet, sugary character and tropical fruit supporting notes. Warm and beachy, distinctly reminiscent of classic tanning products.

items.label: Honey & Shea Fragrance Oil
items.description: Realistic, warm honey scent dominates with supporting notes of sweet, rich shea butter. Buttery and sweet with a creamy character.

items.label: Sunflower Fragrance Oil
items.description: Fresh floral profile evoking the scent of sunflowers on a bright summer day dominates, with supporting fresh, airy characteristics. Bright and summery without being heavy.

items.label: Honolulu Sun Fragrance Oil
items.description: Tropical coconut dominates paired with citrus and pineapple, grounded by vanilla. Fresh citrus, pineapple, coconut, and smooth vanilla create a clean, breezy beach-inspired composition.

items.label: Dream On Fragrance Oil
items.description: White tea and aloe dominate as top notes, complemented by cedarwood, vanilla, and amber, with lily, sandalwood, and musk as base. Calming and spa-like with a fresh yet woody profile.

items.label: Guava Colada Fragrance Oil
items.description: Passion fruit and tropical notes dominate over a sugary, warm vanilla base. Sweet and rich with a heady, indulgent quality and tropical dessert-like character.

items.label: Morocco Fragrance Oil
items.description: Soft, musky base with sweet undertones reminiscent of warm weather, supporting notes include buttery and nutty elements with delicate white floral hints. Warm, gentle, and elegantly balanced.

items.label: Rosemary Grapefruit Lime (all natural) Fragrance Oil
items.description: Rosemary is dominant with citrus elements (grapefruit, lime, lemon, and orange) providing bright supporting notes. Fresh and herbal with a mild citrus edge.

items.label: Spring Has Sprung Fragrance Oil
items.description: Floral dominates with sweet and fresh characteristics representing the first flowers to break ground in spring. Fresh and delicate with subtle sweetness.

items.label: 24K Magic Fragrance Oil
items.description: Bright citrus notes of bergamot and lemon lead, supported by floral mid-notes of magnolia and jasmine, finishing with koa wood and musk. Fresh and clean with a lightly sweet, sophisticated profile.

items.label: Sweetest Taboo Fragrance Oil
items.description: Pomegranate and raspberry dominate middle notes grounded by white woods and peony in the base, opening with lemon crème. Sensual and fruity with balanced sweetness and woody depth.

items.label: Black Velvet Fragrance Oil
items.description: Smoky black tea and fresh bergamot dominate with spicy bay leaf undertones, layering floral and woody middle notes of freesia, rose, and cedarwood over amber and musk base. Captivating and hypnotic with both fresh and warm qualities.

items.label: Cabana Fragrance Oil
items.description: Citrus and marine notes dominate with jasmine and botanical accords in the heart, grounded by amber and musk. Evokes a coastal shore atmosphere that is airy and tranquil.

items.label: Watercolors Fragrance Oil
items.description: Lavish floral notes and sweet fruit accords dominate, grounded by sandalwood and musk in the base. Sophisticated and balanced, evoking the essence of approaching summer.

items.label: Wild Mint & Eucalyptus Fragrance Oil
items.description: Refreshing mint opens followed by eucalyptus and basil in the middle, with sage and musk as the base. Cool and aromatic with herbal undertones.

items.label: White Tea & Sage Fragrance Oil
items.description: White tea and sage dominate, complemented by citrus elements like bergamot and lemon, with violet, nutmeg, and amber base. Light and herbaceous with subtle floral and warm base notes.

items.label: In The Stars Fragrance Oil
items.description: Sugared tangelo sweetness leads, develops through exotic starflower, settling into sandalwood musk, white agarwood, and amber base. Warm and sparkling with a glowing, luminous quality.

items.label: Rose All Day Fragrance Oil
items.description: Bright citrus and floral notes dominate with champagne undertones providing a sweet, airy finish. Bright and bubbly bouquet with a fresh, celebratory quality.

items.label: Baies Fragrance Oil
items.description: Blackcurrant dominates the top notes, supported by Bulgarian rose in the middle with musk and cedarwood base. Fresh and elegant, evoking a garden setting.

items.label: Gingham Fragrance Oil
items.description: Bright citrus top notes of clementine and white peach, supported by floral middle notes of blue freesia and violet, finishing with clean musk base. Fresh, fruity, and soft with subtle warmth.

items.label: Twisted Peppermint
items.description: Peppermint top note combined with sugared snow and vanilla buttercream, grounded by fresh balsam. Playful and winter-fresh with a creamy, cozy profile.

items.label: Champagne Apple & Honey
items.description: Crisp apple and sparkling champagne with jasmine honey in the middle and autumn woods in the base. Cheerful and bubbly with cozy warmth.

items.label: Butterfly
items.description: Raspberry nectar top note with delicate iris in the heart and vanilla base. Sweet and whimsical with a light, airy character.

items.label: Beautiful Day
items.description: Crisp apple and cassis with a floral heart of daisies and peony, white peach and blonde woods in the base. Fresh and spring-like with delicate floral quality.

items.label: Driftwood & Chamomile
items.description: Chamomile top note with driftwood in the middle and vanilla white musk base. Relaxing, warm, and comforting with an earthy quality.

items.label: French Cade Lavender
items.description: Lavender as the prominent middle note with crisp verbena top note and earthy cade wood and moss in the base. Clean, herbaceous, and subtly woody.

items.label: Tomato Leaves
items.description: Tomato leaf with blackcurrant bud at the top, herbaceous green stems and basil in the middle, and moss with soft woods as the base. Fresh, bright, and vegetal with a green garden quality.

items.label: Blue Cotton Candy
items.description: Strawberry, banana, grape, and sugar notes with a vanilla foundation. Sweet and playful, reminiscent of carnival confections with candy-like aroma.

items.label: Pina Colada
items.description: Cherry opening note followed by fresh pineapple and soft cream with supporting notes of banana and peach. Sweet but balanced fruity tropical character.

items.label: Mermaid
items.description: Sparkling mandarin, juicy melon, and apple with middle notes of pineapple, coconut, violet, and jasmine. Driftwood, sugar, and white musk base create a fresh, clean finish with subtle sweetness.

items.label: Honeymoon in Hawaii
items.description: Orange and pear as primary notes with lily of the valley, rose, and jasmine supporting notes, finishing with musky and woody base. Fresh and floral with warm, slightly sweet character.

items.label: Moroccan Argan
items.description: Pear leads with supporting notes of apple and orange, complemented by floral, almond, and musk undertones. Lighter, zesty character with complex sweetness.

items.label: Yellow Summer
items.description: Lemon and orange citrus dominance with melon and citronella in the middle and a floral base note. Sweet lemonade with a floral twist creating a fresh and summery profile.

items.label: Sun Drenched Pineapple
items.description: Juicy pineapple dominates with sweet and sugary undertones and warm fruity notes in the base. Intensely sweet and tropical with bubblegum-like qualities and strong projection.

items.label: Seashore
items.description: Fresh sea air dominance with subtle floral background. Fresh, light, and clean with a slightly tropical quality when blended.

items.label: Holiday Sangria
items.description: Berry and rhubarb as dominant notes over a vanilla base. Fruity tartness from berries and rhubarb with warmth and sweetness from vanilla foundation.

items.label: Tropical Paradise Collection
items.description: Tropical fruits like coconut, guava, pineapple, and mango as dominant notes supported by floral and woody base notes including sandalwood, cedar, amber, and vanilla. Warm, creamy, and fruity evoking island getaways.

items.label: Marine Serenity Collection
items.description: Water-centered notes vary by scent with water lily, jasmine, racing water, citrus, and oceanic themes. Supported by florals, fruits, and citrus elements grounded by woody, musky, and amber base notes. Fresh and aquatic to warm and woody throughout collection.

items.label: Lemon Creme (All Natural)
items.description: Fresh lemon zest as the dominant note with warm caramelized sugar and rich vanilla custard in the base. Sweet and dessert-like, reminiscent of lemon meringue pie with a clean, light quality.

items.label: Honey Almond
items.description: Dominant honey note paired with almond extract, creating a rich and nutty character. Sweet honey and almond with a toasted quality and warm, sweet profile.

items.label: Pink Sugar
items.description: Vanilla and caramel as dominant notes with woodsy and musk undertones. Beautifully sweet creating a warm and creamy scent profile.

items.label: Honey and Vanilla
items.description: Sweet honey notes dominate with vanilla as a supporting element, creating a warm and gourmand profile. Inviting and dessert-like with comforting, sugary sweetness.

items.label: Coconut Sweet
items.description: Sweet orange and coconut top notes followed by wisteria and strawberry in the heart and tonka bean base. Powdery and citrusy with a sweet, decadent quality.

items.label: Coconut Shavings
items.description: Milky coconut dominant top note with nutty praline middle notes and a sweet vanilla-caramel base. Creamy and cake-like with baking spice undertones.

items.label: Candy Cane
items.description: Peppermint is the dominant note, with eucalyptus and spearmint as supporting elements. The overall character is sweet and minty with a holiday-appropriate profile that emphasizes candy-like aspects.

items.label: Country Bumpkin
items.description: Fruity floral composition with vanilla and subtle spice notes creates a scent evoking freshly laundered linens and a quaint cottage atmosphere. The fragrance balances sweetness with clean, slightly powdery qualities.

items.label: Jolly Rancher Watermelon
items.description: Watermelon leads the composition, supported by white floral middle notes and a vanilla musk base. The overall character is sweet with a tart candy-like quality evoking the classic candy brand.

items.label: Bubblegum
items.description: Fruit punch opens the fragrance and develops through spiced middle notes before settling into a vanilla base. The overall profile is sweet and nostalgic, evoking childhood bubblegum with candy-like fruity characteristics.

items.label: Summer Carnival Collection
items.description: Six distinct carnival aromas including buttery popcorn, sugary saltwater taffy, tart raspberry lemonade, blue raspberry slushie, creamy vanilla root beer float, and caramel-coated apple. The scents emphasize sweet, gourmand notes reminiscent of summer fair treats.

items.label: White Pine Wilderness
items.description: Earthy forest pine is the dominant note, complemented by lemon, orange blossom, and frankincense in supporting layers. The overall character is fresh and slightly sweet with woody undertones, delivering a natural forest-like quality.

items.label: Snowy Evergreen
items.description: Evergreen is the dominant note, evoking a walk in snowy winter woods with a fresh, crisp, and woody aromatic profile. The scent captures the character of a cold winter forest experience with natural coniferous elements.

items.label: Spiced Caramel Pear
items.description: Pear serves as the dominant note with gooey caramel providing sweetness and depth, complemented by warm spice undertones. The overall character is sweet and indulgent with a cozy, autumnal quality.

items.label: Spicy Plum Pudding
items.description: Juicy, ripe plums form the dominant note with warm spice providing supporting character. The overall profile is sweet and fruity with a subtle spiced undertone.
